For the price, I was completely blown away with this dress and would highly recommend.

Tall girl friendly!! This dress was purchased for my 6ft tall teenage daughter (who is pictured) for homecoming. She's about 190lbs and bustier for reference. I measured her bust and waist before ordering and we went with the sizing according to the chart. It fit her perfectly. It's very flattering, not see thru and the zipper is very sturdy as well. It's perfect for anyone wanting to wear their normal Bra and underwear or even boy shorts underneath, which is what my daughter hated about last years dress being a bustier girl, the bra and tape issues made her night awful for comfort. This dress allows her to be comfortable in her own body and it has some give and stretch so she can move and dance. Great value with this dress considering it can be dressed up or worn to church or an event after as well. The material is thick enough to make this a wonderful purchase for anyone looking for a more modest, cute dress. We paired this with some of my daughters favorite shoes she already had for her alice in wonderland themed homecoming. The photos are just preliminary try on and not the actual day of, but it gives you an idea of how tall my daughter is and how this dress sits in length, because us tall girlies know the struggle! Anywho, this dress is great and very comfortable. I'd highly reccomend.

This dress was simply beautiful. I wore it to a formal banquet honoring local law enforcement. I felt beautiful. I was nervous because I am picky: I’m heavy chested and curvy, I wanted a dress that flattered me, but wasn’t like wearing a tent or made my chest steal the show. This dress held me like a goddess. I’m 5’1” about 160lbs. Size 14 fit perfectly. I get cold easily, this dress kept me warm, but it wasn’t hot. It was perfect. It is long, I didn’t have enough time before the banquet to hem it, so I held it as I walked so that I didn’t trip. I was sitting at the event most of the time, so it wasn’t a big deal, however, I’m going to get it hemmed for the next event. The fabric was beautiful, the navy blue color was beautiful. For an Amazon dress, shipped overnight, to a picky dress shopper for a formal event, this dress was perfect. Pro tip: I tossed it in the dryer with a damp wash cloth on medium for about 20 minutes and it came out wrinkle free and ready to wear. What can I say, I’m a woman on a budget with fancy places to be! Hahaha.

Curve hugging, beautiful dress! Wear spanx for best fit This dress was so flattering once I figured out sizing and found spanx for underneath! My advice- If you’re between sizes, size up. If you are comfortable with a tight, form fitting dress stay true to your normal sizing, otherwise size up for a less tight fit. The material isn’t very thick, so I would definitely recommend spanx or some shape-wear so your underwear lines and any imperfections are maintained. Overall I really love the fit and am so happy with it, especially for the price, just know it isn’t double lined or very expensive feeling fabric. I am 5’ 6” with pretty long legs and it fell a few inches above my ankles, which was about where I wanted it.

Elegant, but Check the Sizing Chart! This elegant dress is lovely in the black and gold flower design, and the patterned material helps camouflage its seams at the waist and knees. I am 5’7” and typically wear a size 16/XL, but according to the provided sizing chart, my measurements matched the XXL best, and that’s what I ordered. I’m glad I did as it fits me well. The dress is made from a polyester material, and while it has a long zipper down the back, I could not get it to open at all. Fortunately the dress is stretchy enough that I could simply slip it on and off over my head and just disregard the zipper. The stretchiness along with the slit skirt allow for easy movement, and the winged shoulder material is tacked down at the hip so it isn’t too fluttery. Overall, I like this dress to wear it (with shapewear!) for special occasions and recommend it, given that you check your measurements against the sizing chart.

I was able to put it on without unzipping the zipper. I probably could've went down a size for sure. However, I didn't wear a girdle, no strapless bra and no pasties. I knew it was gonna be a long day of events. I was aiming for comfort. The fabric was thick and hid most of my love handles. It wasn't scratchy at all. The sequins stayed attached and were of great quality. Of course, I added some some costume jewelry because, why not! I received lots of wonderful compliments. I will definitely keep this in my cashe of gowns.

Perfect formal gown This gown worked great for a formal gala event. I am 5‘5“, 135 pounds, size 6 fit well. The only issue I had was, certain jewelry would snag on the fabric, be careful what rings and bracelets you wear. Overall, super happy about the dress quality

So Beautiful and Flowy! This Grace Karin dress is so beautiful and flowy for spring and summer! I got the size small (I'm 5'6" and 120 pounds, size 4) so it fits me very well. The fabric is comfortable and breathable, making it ideal for spring and summer weather. It looks flattering on me. The only thing I would change is that I wish the elastic band was just under the bust and not further down because it leaves a little extra fabric under the bust. I'm small chested (34A) so women with larger busts may not have that issue. It washes well and I love the tiered layers. The fabric is thick enough that you don't have to wear a slip underneath. Very happy with this dress!

So Beautiful and Flowy! This Grace Karin dress is so beautiful and flowy for spring and summer! I got the size small (I'm 5'6" and 120 pounds, size 4) so it fits me very well. Very THIN, but modest length and neckline This green maxi dress is flat out gorgeous. Based on the ad images, which I examined closely before purchasing, I was expecting this dress to be less sheer than it is. That is my only concern. The material is silky, with permanent accordian plates throughout, and moves beautifully. The split is visible, and if you prefer modesty, it can easily be pinned or a straight stitch or tacking, to minimize the amount of split. The neckline is high, slightly scooped and rounded. The back closes with one button at the top, but my 2 models just slipped their head through. This is pictured on one model who is 5' 9" tall and 200lbs. The other is 5' 2" and about 175/180lbs. The beginning of the split starts much lower on the shorter person. There's a satin trim on the inside of hem around neckline. There's a simple stitch at the bottom hem of dress (pictured)-its not very attractive, but not overly visible. The neckline button is a clear faux "crystal" plastic button. No pockets. You will absolutely need to wear a dark slip underneath the green dress to be modest, unless see-thru is desired. I would say this would be a great formal gathering dress, or mother of the bride etc. As of 6/15/2024, this beautiful dress is about 48 dollars, which is a good value. *Please view pictures and any video as I consider them part of my full review.

Perfect fit! This has become a new favorite dress for me to wear! Very comfortable and stretches nicely. Definitely flattered my waste. I got a large which fit perfectly. I'm 5*3 and 160lbs.

AMAZING This has become one of my favorite dresses. It’s not too short (I’m 5’9) and is very light weight but not see through. The sleeves aren’t tight around my arms and it’s very easy to move around in.

This has go to be one of my best purchases EVER. For reference, I’m 5’7, 175 lbs. I ordered a large and it fit perfectly. I wore this dress to a wedding. I felt amazing. Not sure what the fabric is exactly, but it is soooooo comfortable and stretchy. I live in the great state of Washington, and when I ordered this dress it was 77 degrees out. When the wedding day came, it was 57 degrees. Luckily I found this shawl, also on Amazon that went perfect with the dress!! So happy with this choice :)

The most comfortable and flattering dress - I have been living in this! This has quickly become my favorite summer dress. I love that I don't have to wear a bra with it (I am a 36C) and that it is not terribly short (I am 5'6" with a long torso). I got the light blue color, and it is not at all see through anywhere on the dress. I am wearing a size small, and fit that it fits typical to the clothes I order on Amazon - I always have to size down with dresses because I have more of a petite frame on top. I would suggest sizing down if you are between sizes, and for a more flattering fit. I love the flowy feel of this, and that it covers my tummy nicely without making me look like I am wearing a sack. I highly recommend this dress!

Ooooooo Mamacita! Finally got my "Lady in Red" dress :) This has really high quality construction and high-end fabric. It feels substantial and well made and OOOOoooo La La! Smokin' hawt. I am 5'1" (in flats) and 115 lbs. Bust 36, Waist 27, Hips 37. I wear a 34 E/F bra. I ordered the small. This thing FITS ME LIKE A CUSTOM GLOVE. I'm headed over to the seller's (OWIN) store to see what else they have because this is really quite impressive. The V neck is deep but it doesn't gap open. You can see my bra peeking through in one of the photos. That doesn't especially bother me as I plan to wear an appropriate black bra beneath it. The fabric is smooth and soft, and not shiny. It looks expensive. It moves with you without losing shape. If you have a little tummy I think the ruching is going to flatter your curves. I like that the ruching is well-constructed and doesn't add any bulk at all. My tummy looks flat. Sometimes you never know what "wine red" is going to mean, right?, but I can say it is pretty much true to the color as pictured by the seller. As I sit here looking at my can of Dr. Pepper, it's kind of like that, or a dark cranberry? Anyways, it's VERY pretty. The zipper in back is classy, well stitched and smooth to operate, I had no trouble zipping myself. If the quality of the white fabric is the same as this red one I doubt very much it would be see through at all. I might have to buy a white one because that would be just knock-out gorgeous for summer. Love this thing. Can't wait for my husband to see it., but I'm wondering if I should buy a taser first, lol. :D

I got a ton of compliments on it, and I definitely would recommend it for comfort and suggest that because the fabric is so sheer that you really can’t do much other than hope the lining is in its proper place. Definitely would have like the price to be half because of the sheerness of the fabric. It worked great for a costume, and I suggest not buying it for something that requires a high quality item. The slit was very fun.

Beautiful for 5'4" or below This is a beautiful airy dress. It is generously sized, but short-waisted. I am 5'7" and I think this would work better for 5'4" or below.

I'm in Love with this dress! This is a beautiful AND comfortable maxi dress. The pockets make it a 5 Star Bestseller in my book. The material is light and flowy, it just moves with you and begs to be worn all day. The split v-neck is ideal for either showing a little cleavage or if you are a nursing mama, this would work great. I am larger busted and the smocked gathering fir directly beneath my bust, making for a comfortable and natural delineation. The lace at the bottom can be easily dressed up with a cute pair of heels or wedges. I can also see myself throwing on a pair of flip-flops and heading toward the store. The arm sleeves are adorable and loose with a fluttery look. I did tighten the string in the back a bit and it did help lend a more modest neckline, but if I feel like I need to cover up more, then I will just throw a layering tank underneath. This is a very long maxi, I'm 5'6 and the bottom rested on the top of my feet. I'm gonna try it with a skinny belt and kind of a blousing action to see how it looks to give me a little more wiggle room to wear with flatter shoe wear. The pockets are a great size to hold a multitude of items from phone, to keys, to whatever. This is a very figure flattering and beautiful dress. I would highly recommend to anyone 5'6 or taller - any shorter and you will probably have to have it hemmed.

Classy and beautiful This is a beautiful and well made dress! The material is very comfortable and not sheer. The lace is soft and not scratchy. It’s perfect for a wedding that is coming up. I’m 5’5” and about 190, the large fits perfectly. I had no issues zipping and unzipping myself. It slightly drags on the floor, but with a small heel will fix that. Definitely perfect for a wedding or dress up event!

This is a beautiful boho STYLE dress that is true to COLOR. It’s a nice hunter green. The color looks slightly different in my camera but it is a deep green. I sized up but I think I could have gone with my regular size. But it’s elastic and still fits. So I would say TRUE TO SIZE and forgiving if you gain/lose weight. NO LINING but the material isn’t that thin so I’ll go without. It does have POCKETS which I love for light things like cash, Id or bank card. LENGTH is floor length and I’m 5’4 DETAILS are beautiful too. There’s the elastic top, tiered bottom and raised polka dots which make it understated beautiful. The elastic wrist is also a nice detail that feels elegant. I can’t wait to wear this for Christmas service. I have a few Pretty Garden dresses and I’m never disappointed. Always good quality.

Beautiful dress - perfect for fall This is a beautiful dress - I'm not a huge fan of prints so I opted for this solid purple color. I own zero items in purple but I'm so happy I decided to give this dress a try. It fits amazing and feels great against the skin. I got a medium and it fits great even as a 36D up top. The fabric is soft, thin but not see through, drapes well, and hides any imperfections with the amount of stretch it has. In fact, this dress could double as a maternity dress because of the empire waist and then later be used as a regular dress for mom - multi-functional! Overall I was impressed with this dress and the fit which made me feel very confident. Very happy with this dress and hope it lasts for several years!

Beautiful dress at a low cost!!! This is a beautiful dress and a deal for the price!!! Looks expensive. Hugs all the right areas and hides the problem areas. I just wish the top was a lighter color because I am hoping to wear to an outdoor wedding. I am 5'6 and it goes to the floor. I could still wear flats or heels. It is the perfect combination of formal/casual depending on your occasion. Could be dressed up or played down.

I got a L, I wear a 10 in most jeans. I’m about 5”2 and did have to get a couple inches altered off. I’d recommend wearing your hair up, otherwise it will snag. 10/10!

Beautiful dress, loose stitching This is a beautiful dress and fits perfectly on my body. Not too loose just enough snug to show off body and dance freely. I am 138lbs 5.5' and even though I am a Medium, sized up to a Large and the fit is perfect. The only reason I did not give this 5 stars, is as you can see in photo, dress came with a tear. At closer inspection saw that the machine did not catch the seams well. Being fabric is delicate and soft it's easier to mend by hand instead of using my own sewing machine. That is an inspection failure. I would have easily given the dress a 5 rating if not torn. Still a beautiful dress for any Spring or Summer occasion. Matched the other items to go with dress. Good buy and I recommend.

Beautiful Dress!!! This is a beautiful dress love the color and it fits me like a glove. I ordered the color Buff /short sleeve, in size 8 I’m 5’5 132 lbs bust 34 and the fit was perfect the only alteration it needed was the hem. When I tried it on my husband said WOW it looks like it was made for you. It was very comfortable to wear all night the lining and lace is soft and the color will go well with all skin color. I walked my youngest brother down the aisle at his wedding and received lots of compliments on the dress.

Gives a great hourglass shape; runs a little big This is a beautiful dress that is versatile and can be wore on so many different occasions. The length and style are modest yet still very stylish. To me, the ruffles at the sleeves and chest and the overall cut give it a classy 1940's vibe. The length falls just below my knees which shows some skin but not too much. The style is an A line cut which is fitted in the waist and then flares out through the bottom. The flare helps camouflage the lower stomach area but still accentuates the waist. It has a crew cut neck and small ruffles at the arm. Again, showing just the right amount of skin to still stay modest. The overall sizing does run a little large. The small was a little large in the bust and waist on me but it was still wearable and looked good. If they had an extra small it likely would have fit me perfectly. I am 5'5" 118lbs measurements 34-25-38. If you see in the last picture the waist has about an extra 2 inches of extra fabric on me. The bust is a tad large as well. But it's really not noticeable in the black dress and I imagine the style isn't meant to be skin tight either. I was also surprised at the quality of the fabric, it's got a good thickness to it and I would imagine even in lighter colors it would not be see through. This is a really stylish, well made dress that looks especially flattering on people with curves. And on people who don't have alot of curves, the flared a-line cut helps give the appearance of a more hour glass shaped figure. Very stylish !

It has a crew cut neck and small ruffles at the arm. Again, showing just the right amount of skin to still stay modest. The overall sizing does run a little large. The small was a little large in the bust and waist on me but it was still wearable and looked good. If they had an extra small it likely would have fit me perfectly. I am 5'5" 118lbs measurements 34-25-38. If you see in the last picture the waist has about an extra 2 inches of extra fabric on me. The bust is a tad large as well. But it's really not noticeable in the black dress and I imagine the style isn't meant to be skin tight either. I was also surprised at the quality of the fabric, it's got a good thickness to it and I would imagine even in lighter colors it would not be see through. This is a really stylish, well made dress that looks especially flattering on people with curves. And on people who don't have alot of curves, the flared a-line cut helps give the appearance of a more hour glass shaped figure. Very stylish !

Beautiful But Way Too Big This is a beautiful dress that looks and feels well made. The combination of the colors and the way they blend together is really gorgeous. I found that a few sequins fell off but nothing major and that is pretty standard for a sequin dress. The dress is lined well so that you don't feel irritated by the sequins. Unfortunately, this dress was just too big and a bit too short on me. I will need to take it in. I cannot even keep it up on my shoulders and the waist is huge. I ordered the Small and I am 5'10, 118 lbs, 32 A/B-25-34 for reference. As you can see from the photos, when I pull this tight in the waist and let the shoulders drop, this dress really moves up a notch. I think I will alter it like this.

Order slightly larger. This is a beautiful dress with quality material. I am 5’3” and 160 lbs and wear a 14 so I ordered one 12-14 and one 16 just to have an option. The 12-14 (L) fit snugly which, if I didn’t have a belly would prob have been ok with some shapewear, but the 16 (XL) looked so much nicer. It is a little roomy but I liked the way it looked. It was 6 inches too long (so was the size 12-14 one!). Another girl had written that she just cut it off at the bottom! So that is what I did. I marked 6” from the bottom all the way accross the front from seam to seam and cut it off with a sharp pair of scissors and then just tapered it and left the back as is. I did the same with the black overlay. I think it looks fine! It is so flowing and falls in grooves that you can’t even tell (unless you are looking really close) and who’s gonna be doing that! I am very happy with my purchase.

Beautiful dress! 100% recommended. This is a beautiful dress, and I am so pleased with it. It fit just as expected. I bought a large as a 5'5", 152 lbs woman. Good quality This is a beautiful dress, the color is a dusty rose. Looks expensive, very elegant , classy and feminine. I am 5.4’ , 126 pounds, 36C . I bought size 6 because I need extra room for my 40’ hips and tights. Love the shoulder cup and neckline. Received lots of compliments ❤️

This is a beautiful dress, they actually sent me the wrong one ... This is a beautiful dress, they actually sent me the wrong one initially (it had ruffles) but this one is more of a classic design. I really like it except for the fact that it's too big on top. I got a small and I'm 5'5 and 110 lbs, it's snug on the bottom but not in a bad way and makes sense because I'm a slight pear shape. You can't really see it in the pics but the top gapes out and it's just too big. If it were tighter I'd keep the dress. the dress is a dark blue but in certain lighting it's a brighter blue. This dress does a great job of holding you in without making you feel like you're a sardine! The quality of the dress material is great and I did not notice and loose strings on it. The zipper works great and there is a slit in the back so you can easily walk in it. There is a slight gathering of the material in the front of the dress which is very flattering and makes the dress have a bit of movement to it. Overall really nice dress and a good price. I would highly recommend to anyone who thinks they can fill out the top portion.

Flowy and Flattering This is a beautiful dress! The style is flattering, neckline not too low, and the fabric flows nicely. The white is a soft white which pairs well with the metallic gold dots. My nude undergarments did not show through. The XL fit perfectly and I am 5'5" with a 44" bust, 38" waist, and 43.5" hips, and I am currently 8 months postpartum. It goes down to my upper ankle.

Great dress This is a beautiful dress. I receive many compliments when I wore it for a wedding. I ordered it expedited and received it on time. I am 5’8”, 188 lbs so I bought the XL. I did not realize that the dress was see-through and the cups that cover the breast showed through, so I took out the fabric cups and put a black bodysuit underneath which worked very well. The top part is snug and doesn’t have much give, but that works because it helps keep the breast from sagging. The dress is shorter in the front and longer than I expected in the back but it was very nice-a lot of fabric. I did not take it to the cleaners but I was able to iron it without a problem. You definitely need to wear high heels because of how long the dress is. The dress doesn’t look cheap, but is constructed very well. Lastly, you will need help tightening the dress up in the back because it’s corset style. You won’t be disappointed if you buy this dress.

Gorgeous dress! This is a beautiful dress. The material is gorgeous and the fit is almost perfect. The dress is a size 4. I’m normally between size 4/6 depending on the fabric. I need more stretch in the chest area to fit into a 4. For reference, I’m 5’3” 118lbs and a 34DD. The dress is a bit long…even in 3” heels it will need to be hemmed a smidge.

Just as pictured This is a beautiful dress. The material is nice and the fit was perfect. For reference, I bought this for my very petite daughter. She is 5’1” and weighs 96lbs. It is longer on her than what is pictured on the model but that was expected. Great purchase!

Ran quite large, odd cups This is a beautiful gown in person, but I think it could be a highly returned item due to sizing, and the fact that the sewn in foam pads are incredibly unflattering – a very low/rounded effect, rather than pushing or perking up. Plus, there's just too much pad. I'm a 35 bust and a 30 waist, putting me on the high end of a large, and there was excess to gather at the waist and especially up top. Since there is no boning, but the fabric is thick, I'd recommend going to the lower end of the size range and hoping the dress fits tightly (with shapewear underneath). You can also see from the ad that the design in the front doesn't really match up. That didn't bother me until I saw it on in person, which changed the experience as well.

Perfect Wedding Guest Dress This is a beautiful, formal dress that would be perfect for a wedding as a guest! I am 5'4, 160lbs, and a 34C bust, and the large fits me perfectly. I usually wear a medium in dresses, but I wanted to ensure that this was not skin tight, so I recommend going up a size if you do not want this dress to be body con. I love the fact that this has an open back and it has two strings to tie or let go on the side. The bust has a deep-v but does not reveal too much. The dress does not have a slit on the side, but it is easy to get on and off by lifting it up since it does go all the way down to the floor. There is a zipper on the side as well to make it easy to get on and off. I like how it didn't show my sweat as I was getting down on the dance floor and I really liked how it has a flowy bottom so you have room to move your feet.

Double layer dress This is a cute dress that may or may not be a good option for me. I'm not sure it is very flattering on anybody, at least it doesn't look the best on me, probably because for this type of dress and my type of body, you need some sort of shapewear under. The fit of this dress is tight, specially around the midsection. But I appreciate that it is double layered, because that gives you some tummy control. I found this dress to be longer than it looks on the model photos, on my 5'6" height, the dress goes a few inches above the knee. My favorite part is the off the shoulder detail on one side, I think it is really cute. I have to try this dress again with some shapewear to see it convinces me to wear it, specially for the price. Another thing to notice is the weight, probably because of the knit fabric used on the making of this dress and since it is ruched, it needs more material.

This is a cute summer dress. The fabric is fairly thin, not see-through, it’s just going to show every line/bump. Overall, it’s flattering and comfortable but is definitely not something I would wear in a super formal setting, due to the fabric. This is something I would wear to a more casual dinner/date night (if I got a color other than black, I might were it elsewhere too). The tie along the back was easy to figure out and put together. I'll have it in all colors 😏 This is a definite yes...love the color and fit. I'm 5'1" 175lbs and I have a size M. I'll be purchasing more dresses like these soon and will wear them on my IG @Collins2Collins

slinky, stretchy and smooth! This is a fabulous dress! The fit is not only perfect on my 42-32-40 figure, the back is high enough and the front is cut so that I can wear a proper strapless bra and be covered up, supported, and still look terrific! The colour is such that you could wear with black or apricot/beige tights, the sparkles are fun, and the material is slinky and stretchy, reminiscent of the acetate of the 90s but in a modern style. The off-the-shoulder sleeves, with the cute feathers (watch out for those, they may make you sneeze) ensure that there is no bulging under the arms, which is a fantastic addition. The ruched front is slimming and the back clings in a flattering way without being too tight. The zipper slit is a great idea if you need modesty or just a little more room to walk. The latter is the only key proviso we'd mention. I'm 5'7" and have a 32" inseam. I'm wearing 6" platform heels in these photos. If you're under 5'7" or have lower heels, you may want to get these dress hemmed. Even so, it would be worth it. 5 stars!

Flattering, and a bargain This is a fairly simple but elegant stretch-velvet cocktail dress that hits all the right marks. The stretch fabric means it's more forgiving on different types of figures, but the fit generally is true to size. (It's being worn here by my 5'6" daughter who normally wears a size 2--this dress is the Small.) It also moves well, and doesn't ride up when seated. There is a kind of slip/apron under the ruffles at the front, so that neither the wearer (nor anyone looking at them) will be surprised by unexpected gaping.

I wore spanx underneath it of course but that with the added support from this dress, it really smoothed and contoured my curves nicely! Highly recommend and will purchase other colors in the future! I’m 5’1”, about 140-45lbs, curvy, usually wear a medium top and bottom or size 8 jeans, 34D bra - I bought this dress in a medium and still could fit this whether I gain or lose 10lbs the stretchy material is that good. Rave Worthy - For One Use This is a gorgeous and unique dress, my daughter got nothing but compliments when she wore it for her Prom. She loved the comfort for movement and the soft lining. However, I am glad I didn't pay anymore than what I did as it is only a one-time use. By the end of the night it was so stretched out up top that it didn't lay right anymore, was bagging up on the shoulders and kept falling down in the chest area. And the material snagged and pilled badly on the front just from wearing her seat belt. So, if you need a dress for a one time event, this is fantastic and will get you solid raves. Also, I'm glad something told me to opt for the Large size after reading other reviews. Going by the measurement chart, she would have needed a Small as she does in most other apparel. This dress though, against what their measurement chart suggests, does run very small. My daughter is 5'10½" tall, 33B x 27W x 38H so the small would have been way too small and not long enough. The large fit perfect.

This is a gorgeous, well-made dress for the price. I am giving it a 3 out of 5 because there was enough just off enough for me to not keep it. First and foremost, I didn’t necessarily find the dress very flattering for my slender/athletic body-type (probably mostly because of the shine of the satin-like fabric). I am 5’5”, 117 lbs, 32C, 26 waist and typically wear a Size 2. As you can see in some of the photos, the dress attracts attention to any ripple in the stomach area - even if it’s just the general outline of your bellybutton. I’ve never worn them myself, so I don’t own a pair - but I’m thinking a nice pair of Spanx would help tremendously! Additionally, the dress was SUPER long on me. It would have needed to be hemmed. The draping is beautiful for pictures, but not effective for walking around or dancing. Per some of the previous reviews, the arm holes were just a tad tight - but not too much of a concern for me. At the end of the day, the dress is a quality thick satin-like fabric that is soft to the touch and seems to be wrinkle resistant with a fun flute/mermaid cut - super fun for a gala or themed decades costume party. I loved the fact you can wear a normal bra with it! Great slight cowl cut on top. It is a beautiful color and could be the right dress for the right person! Just not for me.

Soft and comfortable suit set - more comfortable if you size up This is a nice looking suit set - although I can see where it may become easily wrinkled looking at the material (and you can tell by the pictures that it came wrinkled). This is made in China and so typically, I size up for comfort. I usually do wear a medium but went for a large. I am usually a size 6-8 in pants (depending on how much I've eaten). Otherwise, I'm happy with this and may get a few others of these in different colors.

Very pretty dress - I like it - but I will be making some adjustments This is a nice quality dress that has a flattering fit and elegance that can work for a number of situations (wedding guest, cocktail party, vacation, etc). Disclaimer - I am 4'10" and 125 lbs with athletic build so while I really like this dress - i'm going to need to make some adjustments. I got the navy size small. First - the length is too long for my short frame (see photos) as it falls below my knees and has a tapered fit without a slit (if you're a normal height person, will probably be okay). But I can't take normal size steps as is. Next, the cut and ruffle down the front is very pretty in person! But I think the long sleeves AND the ruffle are a bit much. The sleeves are light and airy and actually a good length on me. If you like to cover your arms, this might be perfect for you but I'm thinking of cutting the sleeves off. I feel very comfortable wearing this and think it's flattering. I'm going to try a couple of modifications and plan to wear to an outdoor wedding in September!

Beautiful top This is a nice top that can be part of a nice outfit, whether it’s a skirt or a pair of nice pants. However, I think this blouse is not for everyone just because of the design and the cut and the fact that the fabric does not stretch. It is just for the right body type. I think it would fit better those with narrow hips For example, I am 5 feet and 5 inches tall and weigh 130 pounds and normally wear medium-sized clothes. The size chart for this top shows medium as sizes 8-10, which is too big for me. However, I am glad that I got medium size because, otherwise, my hips wouldn’t fit because the hem seems to be fitted and doesn’t stretch. The size I got is a little big in the shoulders, though, but not too big. I can still wear it. The only issue with this top I have is how the sequins are sewn on. They are attached very unevenly, but I am not going to deduct any stars for that because you can’t really see it unless you examine the blouse closely.

The chiffon material is soft, about the same quality material you will find of the Davids bridal bridesmaids dresses. The lining material is a cheap polyester that I would say is consistent with a night gown, cheesy but comfortable. I expected it to be a bit cheesy because of the price point. Pretty but not forgiving This is a pretty dress. It's comfortable, I like the color and the slit doesn't go up too high (It's also sewn at the top of the slit (under the ruffles) which I like so there's no accidental showing of too much skin. The zipper was extremely hard to zip (might be a combo of a weak zipper and it being on the side of my curves) but once it was on, it didn't feel tight or uncomfortable. The fabric however is not very forgiving so I would have to wear shapewear. Something about the shape of the dress and placement of the ruffles really emphasized my hips. I'm cool with hourglass shape but this made me look huge. By the way this is floor length on me because I'm 4'11" but that's what I expected. It might work with shape wear but since I'm personally not loving the one shoulder look either, I'm going to return it.

Simple but elegant wedding dress! This is amazing! I’ve never wanted to buy an expensive wedding dress that I would only wear for a day. Despite all the objection from the ladies in my life, I turned to Amazon to find a dress. I figured I could always just return it if I hated it. I saw another reviewer wearing this dress with a bridal belt and I loved it! So, I bought this dress, a bridal belt and a lace cardigan all from amazon! I bought a different cardigan at first and hated it but returned it with no hassle! Of course, I haven’t had my wedding yet so I’m just sharing a picture of me trying it on (I will be wearing a shirt heel strap oh sandal with it, also from Amazon). I am 5’3”, 160lbs. This is size L. My friend who is 5’8” and 145lbs also tried this on and it looks great on her too! It really is for any body type(I’m hiding a lot of stomach fat under there). This can be dressed up with a bridal belt or the belt can be left off for a more simple look! I plan to dye this dress pink or black after my wedding so I can wear it again (I’m not one to buy meaningless things, I hardly even buy home decor that doesn’t have a function). Don’t hesitate to buy it! You will look wonderful! You can always buy two sizes at the same time and return the one you don’t want for an expedited process. Also, what you wear underneath makes a difference for my fellow curvy girls! I purchased an expensive bodysuit shapewear (the ones with built in bras) from here and it looked horrible. Every buldge and roll could be seen! So, I just bought a less expensive shapewear tank top which I’m wearing under here and it made all the difference. This is pretty sheer so you will need a nude slip! Even with purchasing all the different bits and pieces to put together my own wedding dress, I only ended up paying around $170 for everything from head to toe that I will wear for my wedding.

Beautiful dress with stunning details This is an extraordinarily beautiful dress! I am 5’2”, about 140 lbs with a 36DD chest and ordered a medium. I’ll need to get this dress hemmed, as it is way too long (even with heels). Works for girls with larger chests. Keep in mind that there is a lot of material. There are a few downsides. The zipper tends to stick, making it difficult to get on. It takes some patience. Also, the off the shoulders look on the top can be a bit square to the hips, adding a few pounds. Nothing that some nice posing can’t fix, but it’s good to know. I originally bought this for my wedding. Not sure if I will use it for my wedding dress or for a rehearsal or reception dress. It would work for any of these. Overall, it has a lovely, vintage feel with gorgeous lace detailing- all for a great price.

Who sewed this! This is my experience with this dress: First, it is a beautiful color! The concept was good, the assembly was not! I'm 5' 3", 149lbs. I work out and have an athletic, older persons build. I ordered a M, it fit weird. The top right side was tight across my breast area, BTW I'm a A+ cup (the + is for effort in amost being a B cup! Lol). The shoulder strap was also snug enough that I knew after awhile it was going to start to irritate my skin. The left side was loose and had a big pouf of material just above the waist line, which looked weird. You could tuck it under the belt, but realistically we all know it's not going to stay there for long. I ordered another medium and large to see if they fit any better. (I forgot to take pictures of those 2, sorry!) The 2nd medium was slightly less thight in the areas I had mentioned and the pouf was still there, just not as big. The large looked the best as far as giving that pleated look the model in the picture had. It fit better in the strap area and across my right breast. Unfortunately, the left side under my arm area was so loose it ballooned out on the side of the dress. The waist was a little big. The material just above the side waist area was also pulled and sewn in 2 different directions, which caused it not to lay smooth in an area that was supposed to be. Had to review because it’s that great of a dress This is my first time EVER writing a review on Amazon. This dress is that amazing for me to write a review. Literally in love with it. It hugs my body in a great way. Obviously I have some stomach curves, but the dress doesn’t make it look as terrible as it seems like other dresses. It’s not too tight and it’s not loose. The one complaint I do have about the dress is that it doesn’t have a clasp on the dress. I had to get a tailor to sew one on for me because if you have a big chest like mine, the zipper might not stay up as well. But overall, this dress is literally amazing and is my favorite dress that I have ever bought on Amazon.

Beautiful top, true to size and product description! This is my second top from Bashafo, and they did not disappoint! There is a lot to like about this top: 1) Elegant and modest V-neckline. I love the pleats in the chest! 2) Puff long sleeves and ruffle cuffs give the top a very beautiful, feminine look! 3) The top is long enough for modesty, especially when wearing with leggings and jeggings. The back of the top is a bit longer than the front, which I like! 4) Soft, comfortable, non-clingy fabric, good stitching and finish! 5) The product is true to size. I am 5'4" 115 lb, and the size small fits me perfectly. I usually wear a size small in tops and dresses. The sleeves hit my wrist at the right level. I would highly recommend going by the seller's size chart. 6) The fabric composition is exactly as described by the seller on Amazon - this gets top points from me! Very often, in the product page, tunics and tops are listed with a certain fabric composition, but the actual product label lists a totally different fabric composition. But with this Bashafo brand top, the product label exactly matches the fabric composition on the Amazon product page. Overall, this is a very beautiful top with feminine details and great workmanship. I highly recommend!

This is more formal than a summer sundress, but seems like something that would work for a dinner dress on our upcoming cruise.

Breathable, professional blouse - great color This light, breathable blouse is a well-made addition to a professional wardrobe. I got the “wine” color which, true to the photo, is a dark purple color. This blouse is true to size: I got a size medium and it fit loosely as I expected (I am 5’7”, size 8). The material is very soft and smooth. Although it is thin and breezy, it is not transparent. All the seams are assembled well and unlikely to fall apart quickly with use. The gold detailing is a nice touch, and I got some compliments on it. Overall a nice blouse that fits well and looks professional.

Honest Thoughts 💜 This lilac dress was the most affordable yet modest bridesmaid dress I found 😍 It came in the tiniest box, but once I opened it, I fell in love with the fabric.. It’s very smooth and doesn’t wrinkle or cling👌🏼Overall, it’s a versatile dress suited for any body type 💖 But I will say, it does run slightly big, especially for petites, so DOWNSIZE!! One more thing, it is super long, especially for a shorty like me (5ft). Even with my tallest heels it touches the floor 🤣

Very Elegant This long, elegant dress practically begs for a special occasion. Whether that means a wedding or a fancy night out, the subtle mermaid silhouette dress offers a great look that shows off the wearer’s curves. The neckline is modest, but the sheer area makes it kind of fun. The beading detail around the neck is very eye-catching and only needs a pair of earrings to compliment it (no necklace needed!). The sleeves have a bit of a flare to them that mimics the subtle mermaid style of the bottom of the dress. The fabric is soft but doesn’t seem like it would wrinkle, making the dress travel friendly. In fact, it arrived folded up several times but had zero wrinkles when it was pulled out. The person wearing this dress in the attached photo is 5’7” and 211 pounds. She’s wearing heels. The dress touches the floor without heels. She usually wears a size 16 and that’s the size of the dress.
Perfect dress This looked classy and I felt confident at my daughter’s high school graduation. I bought a medium. I’m 5’10” and 165lbs.

I feel like a princess with pockets! This lovely dress came quickly and it’s amazing! I saw the reviews speaking about the magical and rarely-seen pockets!! YES, there are pockets as previously stated OMG! Please, I’m begging all clothesmakers out there, to hear our call for more pockets! I love nothing more than slipping my wallet and keys into my dress pockets and taking a walk without a purse!! And I can confirm, these are real pockets! They fit more than my hand. I use a cane, a walker, and a wheelchair to get around. Trust me, I would love more clothes with pockets because I already must carry around so much stuff, and then a purse LOL – Ok, I will step down from my soap box 😊 The weight of the fabric really caught my attention. The dress is heavy feeling, but I don’t mind the weight of it as I’m wearing it. I am 5’ and I forgot to measure before I ordered so it comes to the floor on me HAHA!! I am lucky to have a sewing machine so I can fix my shortcomings lol!! I have neuropathy from health issues and my skin is super sensitive. I love how this dress feels on my skin. I even fell asleep on my recliner with the cats, and I wasn’t uncomfortable at all. The dress feels like a hug. I am going to order one more as soon as I can. I’m 5’ 170 and this was a size large. Happy shopping!! (Oh color differences in my pictures were the same dress but in different lights/places. When wearing it outside or in my kitchen it looks like the color in the first picture, other pictures from white light in my bedroom.

Lovely, Versatile Jacket This Luvamia jacket is just as pictured. It is true to size, and has a lovely feminine shape. It's of good quality but feels slightly 'sharper'/stiffer... not as smooth fabric than an identical I've been buying from another seller. I did read many reviews saying it's of excellent quality, so maybe this one, and this particular color, was a one of? I also got it at a discount price so, overall, I'm very happy with it. I love the polks dot lining, especially when I can roll up the sleeves. I'm 67 years old, 5'4", and around 120lbs, ordered size Small and it fits me perfectly.... as my pics show.If you're looking for a nice complimentary jacket to go over pants, jeans, dress, skirt, or even a pair of shorts, this one is perfect. I hope my review is of some help. Thank you.

This material is super comfortable. I’m 5’0”, 150 lbs, usually wear a large. I got this dress in a large, it’s a little loose but I don’t mind it. I think sizing down to a medium could be too snug.

Thinner than I expected but really cute This material is thinner than I expected it to be. Not warm enough to wear in the winter without layering. It would be nice on a 60 to 70 degree day. Any cooler than that and I would be too cold. The collar in the back is just a little lower than a crew neck would be. The length of the dress is acceptable to me. Just above my knees. I'm about 5'2 or 5'3, haven't checked in a while. The sleeves are a bit long on me. I usually have to order an xs or xxs, but I got this in a small and am surprised how well it fits. I suppose being able to tie it helps it fit better. It fits to the curves well, not too tight, but not too loose. My measurements are 32-24-36 for reference. I love the dark green color, my favorite. I like this dress both tied in the front and the back, haven't decided which way I like better yet. Will probably depend on the day and time of month lol. I like it so far. It will make an awesome outfit this fall for a date, event, or even for pictures.

Very long and tight but beautiful on This material is very stretchy and form fitting so you may want some sort of body shaper under it. It is very pretty on and will accentuate your curves. The dress is very long on me and I’m 5’10”, it was dragging the ground. I did have to pin the sleeve area to get it to stay where I wanted. When I moved my arms the sleeves would ride up. Overall I do love the dress. I wore it to a masquerade ball and received lots of compliments on the dress.

One of my new faves This maxi dress is a winner! It is so flattering and the overall look is exactly what I expected. I followed the size chart and ordered a medium, and it fit great. If I had to make a minor complaint… the v-neck was pretty low to just wear to work or church as is. So, if you’re planning to wear this in a more conservative setting, you’ll probably have to safety pin the neckline in place. Otherwise, I absolutely love this dress! It’s a faux wrap style, so I didn’t have to mess around with tying it just right. And the form-fitting top paired with the flowy skirt is so beautiful and accentuates the body very well. Also, this dress has POCKETS! I carried around my keys and my cell phone all day in there with no problems. And I have to mention the belt… I’m usually not a fan of belts because I don’t like having to fuss with them and adjust them to get them just right… but this one is so cute, I had to make an exception LOL. I tied it in the back to smooth out my look, and the black lining just added such a perfect pop! The material is comfortable and has some stretch to it at the top. The length of the dress is also great; it fell right to the top of my feet, so I didn’t have to worry about tripping over it when I walked (I’m 5’6”). Overall, this is a fabulous dress! The color is very bright and vivid and I got compliments all day when I wore it to work. I highly recommend if you’re a fan of maxi dresses and are looking for something that’s very well designed!

Sleeveless dress had interesting lace pattern and fell at the the knee This review is for the green sleeveless XL dress. I am 5'4" and pear shaped and have had 2 kids. My husband selected and ordered this dress for me. Amazon recommended a Large, but he went with the XLarge. The dress came down much further on me than on the model and than in some of the other reviewer pictures - but I want a longer dress, so that is a plus actually. I appreciate the wide shoulders. The color is darker than shown in the model photos, but again, I like it. The lace has a variety of patterns to it that I think is interesting and fun, but I am concerned about how easily it could snag on something when I'm wearing it. The XLarge probably is a bit too large on me as it doesn't fit very well in the back, and there is extra room in the chest, but I think a Large wouldn't look too good either. It isn't a bad dress, the lace is really different looking which adds interest, but I don't think the cut is flattering on my body shape. My husband said he likes it, but I think it is going to go back. If I saw this on someone else I would definitely compliment it based on the darker green color and uniqueness of the lace!

Cute! Watch out for windy days This review will be similar to another review I read here, because it was completely on point.Pros: I was pleasantly surprised how well this fit and how cute it was. I attended a wedding and received many compliments on the dress. I like how the sleeves cover my arms, but are sheer, so it's cool enough for spring/ fall. The cut was perfect to cover my chubby mom tummy, but still very classy and flattering. Material is very light and flowy. I feel very comfortable in this.Cons: The dress is pretty short. I'm only 5'4" (170lb). I got the size Large, and you can see it's still pretty short on me. Wearing this outside, the wind caught the fabric a few times and I def had several "Marilyn Monroe" moments... I'm sure I revealed more than anyone wanted to see that night. The snap on the cleavage area worked for me (I'm a 38C), but it was pretty cheap... felt if I moved the wrong way that it could bust open at any moment and also reveal more than I'd like. So maybe a safety pin would be more secure.Overall, I tried on like 30 dresses from Amazon... this was the clear winner, and I'd definitely wear this again! (Maybe on a non- windy day to an indoor event lol)Ps... don't mind the dusty mirror, but wanted to show how this dress looked.

Great dress, dont follow their size chart This runs so big. I read the reviews that this runs big but this runs REALLY big. I followed the size chart anyways because I was afraid it wouldn't fit at the bust or booty and here we are. It is a beautiful dress though so I will be exchanging it for a different size. The size chart puts me into an XL which should have been a fitted fit but I easily have 2-3" of fabric on each side, and even then the fabric has some stretch. Plenty of room at the hips if you're pear shaped as well as in the bust. For reference, I am 5'7 and 180lbs postpartum with a 36DDD bust. My measurements are 42×35×43 and this is way too big. The quality is very nice and I feel like even a smaller size will flatter my postpartum body while I continue to lose weight.

Gorgeous color, lightweight This sequin cami dress is so sparkly and the color is a gorgeous emerald green. The sequins are stitched to the mesh material which means they lay smoother and aren’t as scratchy. The fabric itself is a thin stretchy, lightweight mesh with a mesh lining and the dark color is pretty opaque. The straps are adjustable and the slit is modest. The dress is form fitting, but has no structure or compression so I will need to wear my shapers underneath to create a more smooth silhouette. I am 5’ and it is basically a full length gown on me. Overall, the look is really pretty and flattering and the construction is good. The price is in line with the style of dress.

Trendy and Sophisticated This set is really lovely and is versatile for both warm and cool weather. When I initially ordered it, I had reservations about the tie front, but to my surprise, it turned out to be really flattering. The way the top crops just above the wide-leg pants adds sophistication. The fabric feels luxuriously soft and drapes gracefully, creating a silhouette that complements any body type. Despite my usual apprehension towards thinner fabrics, given my narrow figure and petite hips, the waistband gives me a comfortable and well-fitted look. I went to happy hour with girlfriends, and they commented on the 'rich mom' vibes I was giving in this outfit. It's a perfect blend of sophistication and style, and can be worn with heels or flats. I'm 5'2" and the size small fits me well, and the pants' length is just right. If you're much taller, then pants would give a cropped look. The color is true to the photographed image. This set should be a staple in anyone's closet!

LOVE LOVE LOVE! This store is rounding out my top favorites for plus-size fashions. Every item I have gotten from here has been on point and this one is no different! Simple but elegant, this is the perfect special event dress. I love how the sleeves are draped and they don't get in the way as you move around. I'm about 300 pounds, stand 5'10", and got a 24W. Lots of good, a few issues This velvet dress is made from super soft and comfortable velvet. I ordered the navy-blue color, and it's really more of a dark peacock blue in person to me, still very pretty, just not exactly navy. I like that it has a crew neckline, long sleeves and is full length. At this point in my life, I just want a dress that looks nice and is comfortable, but I don't have to wear any crazy foundation garments or specialized bra and tape to wear, so this is perfect. The cut of the dress is a little unusual. I'm 5"8" 125lbs, broad shouldered, straight figure, 34A. The dress definitely has more of an empire waist on it than the website pics appear. I say this as a fairly flat chested person, and it was still a weird height waist on me. The other issue is that the belt is a little off. The belt loops are crazy big, so I'll remove them. The belt is matching fabric and wrap around. I really like the length of the sleeves and total length which is great for taller gals. I ordered the size small, but if I were to order it again, I'd get a medium, so I'd have a little more fabric in the torso before the skirt portion starts. This might be an issue for busty ladies, unless you want a true empire style. There is a lot to love about this dress, but I may not end up using it for my party because of the chest/torso portion, I haven't decided.

Very Comfortable and Flattering This was actually a last minute second bridesmaid dress for me, as my first one did not work out. I was worried that I would be disappointed with a second choice dress but ended up liking it more than my original. It is very stretchy and easy to move/dance in. It doesn’t have a zipper which helps a lot since my bust always causes zipper issues. It was very comfortable and not restricting at all. I also thought it was very flattering and a good mix of flowy and formal. The color is more red than burgundy or berry, but that wasn’t an issue for me. It was also much too long for me (I am 5 ft 2) so I did have to hem it. There was a cut on the fabric near the bottom of the dress, but it was part of the portion I was cutting off so it wasn’t an issue for me. I did size up (ordered size 8, usually size 6) as these kinds of dresses tend to run small. The bust was roomy enough but has a grippy lining near the top seam so it didn’t fall down. I got a lot of compliments and was able to feel comfortable while also feeling pretty, which is a win in my book.

LOVED THIS DRESS!!! This was an awesome dress, especially for the price. I am 4'11" so the dress fit perfect in the length. It fell just below my ankle due to my height but that is what I was hoping for. I weight 195. I originally bought the 18W but it was just a little big. I bought the 16W and it fit perfect! It has a nice slight stretch to it. I normally wear a 16-18 in jeans depending on the brand. Given my odd shape I often need to have my dresses altered in length, shoulders and waist... but this dress worked perfectly without alterations!!! I will say, If you are a more modest person, you may want to pin or stitch the top closed a little, But with a fuller coverage black bra (40D), I don't feel that It was too showy for me. If I were larger busted, I would have pinned it. This dress made me feel fabulous. The layer underneath wasn't the best material, but you cannot tell when wearing it. It is not often that I find a nice dress that fits me so great that I love so much.

This was the perfect dress for my special occasion. Very true to size and was a perfect fit. I am 5'3" and there were NO alterations that needed to be done, which was a HUGE convenience. Great last minute purchase.

Perfect Affordable Impromptu Wedding Dress This was the perfect super affordable dress for an intimate elopement style wedding! Like many engaged couples in 2020, we weren't certain when we would be able to have the wedding ceremony we wanted with family and friends, but my fiance and I knew that we didn't want to wait to start our lives together either. So, in less than two weeks we planned a ceremony at our house with just our witnesses and the minister. Of course, I still wanted to look like a bride, so I'm so glad I found this dress on Amazon Prime. It arrived quickly and fit very well! I'm 5'7", about 135lbs, and bra size 34B. The dress wasn't tight at all, although it felt just a smidgen short for my liking, but not so short that I couldn't live with it. It was nicely lined, but you will need to wear white or nude undergarments. And, I absolutely loved the details in the lace. That gave it the bridal touch and made it feel like a much more expensive dress than it actually is. I highly recommend this dress for any bridal shower, Bachelorette party, or casual wedding.

Perfect dress for my sons wedding This was the sixth black dress I tried for my son’s wedding and this one was perfect! For fitting…. I followed the directions on measurements and ordered the recommended size. I usually wear a 20W but was recommended a 22W. So I went with that. Perfect fitting, I’m 5’5” so the skirt hit me just right on the front of my legs. No alterations needed. The only issue was the front part it does flop open so I had to pin it to stay closed. I had many compliments throughout the night. Comfortable to wear and highly recommend.

Perfect Wedding Dress! This wedding dress was phenomenal! After trying on dresses for months at different shops, I couldn’t bring myself to spend $1000 on one dress. I didn’t know what to expect when I ordered this dress from Amazon for $120, but I was shocked at how beautiful and good quality it was. It felt just like the dresses I had tried on at David’s bridal for $800. Thick, sturdy, good volume, but not too heavy. I wanted something simple but elegant. It was so perfect and I had so many compliments. The size chart is accurate. After measuring myself, I ordered a size 12. Im 5’4 and 155 lbs (heavy in my legs and butt). Bra size is 38DD. I might've been able to size down but it fit great when tied up all the way. Luckily, the corset ties in the back made me look snatched like Kim K ad kept the breasts up😂. I also loved the built in bra for someone who does not wear strapless EVER. The dress is not naturally like a ball gown, so I wore a hoop skirt with it that I ordered separately. You might as well order the hoop skirt too and be the full-blown princess on your wedding day, go all the way! Its so worth it! This order literally saved my wedding. 🤍

Fabric clings to skin/weird neck line This would be much cuter if the fabric wasn’t so clingy to my body. Even Static Guard couldn't make it less clingy to my body. This. Dress. Is. GORGEOUS!! The colors are a beautiful, vibrant water-color effect against a soft summer-white field. Why hasn't anyone else posted their pics of this print?? My pics really don't do it justice! The fabric is actually a substantial jersey-type knit with a very smooth feel. It will be hard to snag. In other words, this fabric is a higher end quality than you're going to find with just any off-the-rack dress. The bodice is lined but the skirt doesn't really need a lining. It came out of the bag quite wrinkled but hopefully it will smooth out over time. See pics. And here's my bit of advice with any dress: wear a slip. Always. Regardless of what color it is. Can't stress this enough. It's not about whether a dress is transparent. It's about flow and drape. If a slip is worn, the dress doesn't end up getting stuck between the knees when you're walking regardless of size. This dress can be worn with a crinoline if you're wanting to go retro but it definitely doesn't need one. It just all depends on the effect you're going for. For size reference, I got the XXL and I'm 5'6 and 180. The dress is actually quite comfortable despite some of the reviews stating otherwise. The fabric has some stretch to it so any reaching that needs to be done can be done fairly comfortably, provided the correct size is worn. Add a pair of off-white dress gloves and matching shoes (also Amazon purchases!) to provide the perfect finishing touch!

Stained and overly long To be fair, I received a huge number of compliments on this dress. So why am I giving it only three stars? - It was stained, which I unfortunately didn't notice until I was already at the hotel and preparing to steam it. The stain pictured in the photo was at the back, about halfway down the skirt. Fortunately I was attending a dinner, so was sitting down most of the time and no one could see it. The other stain was at the front along the hem. - It was excessively long. I'm 5'5" and easily had 7 inches of the skirt puddling on the floor. So I had to carry the skirt around to avoid tripping over it. But at least the puddling hid the stain on the hem! I'm going to wash the dress to see if the stains come out before deciding whether to go to the effort of hemming it for future wear. - It explicitly says to not dry clean. Hand washing formal dresses is a big hassle. And I'm skeptical that my home cleaning methods will remove the stains without damaging the fabric. - The waist of the dress has weird proportions and sits oddly. - I purchased the denim blue color, which in person was more of a dusty mint. Lots of people at the event commented on liking the color, but I wasn't terribly happy with it.

THIS IS THE DRESS YALL. 🙌🏼 To be honest, I was hesitant because of the price, but after reading the reviews, I decided to go ahead and try it. I don’t normally write reviews but…. LET ME TELL YOU. This dress is super flattering, very nice quality material, is thick with some shaping, but not hot. Has stretch but also holds in the right places, and very comfortable to move in. Can’t wait to wear this out! For reference I am 5’11, 200lbs and normally a size 12/14. I got a large and it was perfect.

Perfect button up! To start off I’m 5’8”, 145 lbs with a longer torso and a 36D in bra size. Finding a button up that doesn’t gape at my boobies and fits everywhere else is hard 😂 I ordered this shirt in a Medium. There is a slight pull at my chest but I’m wearing a padded bra so I think that could be easily remedied. It fits great everywhere else. The fabric is super soft and has a little sheen to it which I love. The collar and cuffs are pretty structured which I like as well. I will say that if you’re planning to leave your shirt untucked it might be a tad short if you’re wearing pants that are lower cut. I’m tucking mine for work and it’s perfect to not have a ton of shirt wadded up into your pants, haha.

Worked for me but things to know Ultimately this dress worked well for me at an outdoor Miami wedding, but there were some challenges. Pros: The dark blue and gray blue colors are both gorgeous. (More later on why I have two of these dresses.) Customer service quickly sent me a replacement for the dark blue dress. (Again, more later.) After the initial gentle ironing, the gray blue dress traveled well in my carry-on. The fabric hung beautifully (I’m nearly 5’8”, 116 lbs.); it’s like satiny slip or nightgown fabric. I dressed it up with a silver wrap and shoes, received many compliments, and still looked good after hours of dancing (two photos provided here were taken late night after the wedding, forgot to pose with the full ensemble). The price is hard to beat. Cons: I gently washed the dark blue dress before wearing and it came out covered with tiny spots (see one photo); I feel certain it was not due to my washer (the instructions did not seem to requite hand washing) but I can’t say for sure whether it was due to faulty dye or something else out of my control. The stitching at the neck, arms and side slits, while not super prominent, looks a bit cheap and is more obvious on the gray blue dress than the dark one (see photo of neck area). The two rounded buttons at the back of the neck are VERY difficult to get in and out of the loops provided. (I succeeded but recommend you replace them with slightly smaller buttons or have someone ready to help.) The small was not at all fitted as in the ad photos. I am happy with the fabric, but be aware it is thin and won’t hide much except for some help provided by the flowing nature of the dress. The full story is that, once the laundry debacle occurred with the dark blue dress I ordered through Vine, I ordered and paid full price for the gray blue one right away, fearing the replacement process would take too long and that I couldn’t trust the dark blue fabric. However, customer service assured me the replacement would come quickly and it did, in time for the wedding! That said, I loved the gray blue color and decided to go with that one, not washing it ahead of time. Everything worked out well. I’ll post more photos if I get some shared from the event. I have not yet washed the replacement dark blue dress, as yet unworn, or the gray blue one that’s been worn the one time. I plan to hand wash them with a delicate wash I’ve ordered. I will update with the results!

Decent Quality and Lovely UPDATE: For anyone considering the Champagne color, it is actually more of a pale, warm (faintly pink) nude color (attached more pictures). I have pale olive skin that leans slightly cool-neutral in tone (though I have a fading, fake tan in all the photos), that would work with the gentle tone of the dress. Just keep in mind that it doesn’t quite resemble the product photos. _______________ Infinity dresses are so versatile, so if you’re looking to get one for a lower cost, this is a fantastic option (though, still a little pricey for actual cost and ease to make it yourself). There is an elastic seam in the waist, but the rest of the edges are unfinished and not hemmed. HOWEVER, a bonus is that the elastic waist is relatively hidden with an internal seam — so none of the visible bunching of fabric at elastic waists in similar, cheaper-looking infinity dresses. The fabric is your typical “stretch knit” (polyester-spandex) blend, so there is a slight sheen, so darker colors will look more formal for that reason. Overall, it makes a great option for those wanting something customizable for costumes or events favoring matching sets (that is, perfect for bridesmaids of difference sizes). I’m about 5’1” tall with a 34B bust, 26-27” waist, and a 37” hip. I think it should be just at floor level (maybe a bit longer) if I wear 3” heels, so perfect if you’re petite and don’t have time to have the dress altered.

I'm getting it altered to fit better next time.

It’s Flattering and Danceable ! UPDATE! This dress is even better than expected! I wore it to our first event in over a year-a wedding and the compliments I received were off the charts!! This dress was incredibly comfortable all night. I danced in it, I ate a ton of food during the cocktail hour and the stretchability was epic. I ate a full dinner and dessert and also partook in a few beverages and the dress never became uncomfortable! I LOVE THIS DRESS!Whoa!!! This dress is incredibly flattering! My piggy bits are well-hidden! TBH, I’m very pleased with this dress! I have a wedding to go to next month and it’s black-tie. Although I’ve got other long dresses appropriate for the occasion, this caught my eye because due to the slit, it’s very danceable and not confining!The fabric has stretch which makes it comfortable for gorging appetizers, a main plate and dessert! The ruffles add a bit of a fun touch and the high neckline hides the Turkey neck!! My only concern is is the zipper gets a bit difficult to move with ease around the waist but I ran wax paper over it and it’s fine now.At 5’6”, I gained 18 pandemic pounds but the Medium fits my 157 pound body very well.It’s a very well-constructed dress and although polyester, it’s lightweight !For the price , this dress is epic greatness ! And might I add to my over-60 gal pals, this is a very pro-aging dress!!!!

Surprisingly Nice Dress for Any Age or Size. Usually with the other GK items I’ve tried, I consider them a more mature or matronly fit. But, ironically, this fun “mother of the bride” semi-formal dress and jacket is stylish for any age. Honestly, I got it mainly for the colorful sequin jacket, but I’m very impressed with the entire ensemble. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34C, 27”Waist, 34”Hips, and got a size 6. It fits great, maybe a bit loose and drooping in the waistband, but I’m on the skinny side. The skirt is ultra flowy with a modest slit. I’m also happy with the jacket. It will fit a range of sizes, but isn’t boxy or too big. The dress is made of a semi-transparent chiffon-like fabric stitched over a solid silky lining. It’s lightweight and comfortable without any irritation from the sequins. They’re attached well, though there are a few loose threads here and there and they occasionally get stuck together. Normally I would not wear black to a wedding, but I think the rainbow of sequins make it just lovely. There are so many different colors that you can wear the jacket with other outfits too. This dress just went into my fancy-stuff rotation. It’s so versatile for a variety of events.

Loved it! Very happy with this dress for the price. I purchased a size 4(125 pounds - measurement: chest 34, waist 28, hips 35) and it fit perfectly. Pros: + Very long - I am 5’ 4” and had to have it hemmed about 4ish inches but this would be amazing if you are taller + Pockets + Adjustable due to the corset back + Very flattering + Beautiful color - not bright orange like some of the product photos - it is a muted burnt orange color + Lined Cons - Smelt fishy so I had it dry cleaned - You will absolutely need help getting in and out of it. I have to completely undo the corset back to get in and out of it. - I have a shorter torsos so the straps wanted to fall down my shoulders. I would recommend this dress as a great bridesmaid dress option despite some cons due to its price and how pretty it is!

I usually am a size 6 in dresses and ordered a 4/6 and it fit like a glove - nearly perfect! Surprisingly good quality for the price Wary of poorly produced prints, I gave this one a try and it didn't disappoint. The pattern is bright and overall the dress is well made. There's a small side zipper, a corset-like laces on the back and the neck band so it was easy to adjust for me. I am 5'7 and 165 lbs, with smaller chest, so having all the adjustments to avoid chest gaps was nice. The belt band is not attached to the dress so it can be worn without it. The material feels nice and light and makes it a perfect summer dress. So far I didn't notice any issues with stitching. The only complaint I have that might be related to shipping / pre-shipping treatment is that when the dress arrived, the package was humid inside, with a bit of condensate. Based on the delivery times, it was in transit for about 24 hours, and the fabric is okay, but I am just not sure why this happened. So make sure to remove the item from the package promptly and not let it sit there for too long.

A Beautiful dress for a ver special day! We decided to basically elope- so the only option i had was prime- i was a bit nervous but for under $200 i was soooo happy i took a chance on this dress! With only a day and a half before the wedding i decided to just tackle the alterations myself! I am no seamstress by any account but was able to shorten the dress- i cut the tulle and then liquid stitched the underskirt! I was also able to take it in by liquid stitching on either side of the zipper and then tacking it with a needle and thread! I took off the draping pearls around the waste and added the blush ribbon and then i shartened the spaghetti straps with a needle and thread! It was perfection!! Ive had so many compliments on this dress and all for a very reasonable price! The quality isnt too bad- the ONLY thing sub-par was the ribbon that laced up the back as it wasnt that strong but it was just fine for our special- yet simple wedding day!! I am 5'4" 105 so the small was a bit big but made it work perfectly!!

I am no seamstress by any account but was able to shorten the dress- i cut the tulle and then liquid stitched the underskirt! I was also able to take it in by liquid stitching on either side of the zipper and then tacking it with a needle and thread! I took off the draping pearls around the waste and added the blush ribbon and then i shartened the spaghetti straps with a needle and thread! It was perfection!! Ive had so many compliments on this dress and all for a very reasonable price! The quality isnt too bad- the ONLY thing sub-par was the ribbon that laced up the back as it wasnt that strong but it was just fine for our special- yet simple wedding day!! I am 5'4" 105 so the small was a bit big but made it work perfectly!!

Great dress! Classy, comfortable We live in the South and I needed a dress to wear to a black tie optional Boston wedding. Not easy to find sleeves down here to hide the multitude of Covid sins I have commited... Feeling hopeless I grabbed a glass of wine and hit Amazon like it was my job. I purchased 6 dresses altogether in multiple sizes and lengths and hoped for the best. When trying on the dresses this one stood out above and beyond the others. The style is very flattering, the material a bit stretchy and incredibly comfortable. There is a bit of gummy lining the shoulder area which held the neckline slightly off the shoulder in place all evening. I did feel there was just a little something missing so I reached into the depths of my closet and grabbed a petticoat that I had from a halloween costume many years ago. Honestly it was the best decision. It added an entire retro flair and hid a roll or two... I LOVED the look so much I ordered a navy blue petticoat so that it blended (about $12 also from Amazon). BEST DECISION EVER. I can't tell you how many compliments I received on the dress (even from the youngsters! ) I completed the look with actual vintage crystal necklace and bracelet I inherited from my mother in law. This is the photo of the dress literally out of the plastic bag with the petticoat. This style would be lovely on every figure. if you have any doubts at all order the dress in multiple sizes. This vendor has free returns. For reference I am 5' 5" and currently weigh 150. I purchased M and L. Chose the Large although the medium would have done in a pinch.

LOVED IT!! We LOOOOOOOOOVED our Infinity dresses! They fit us all well. We purchased for our photo shoot in Hawaii. The sizes are true fit. My daughter is 5'7 and 122lbs and she wore a size M. The bottom portion of the dress is very very see through so we wore a skirt slip. The only downfall was I wish we took more time to figure out the many many ways we could've worn our dresses. MAHALO ps... I will definitely order another in a different color for their prom :)

Gorgeous Formal Dress We ordered this dress for my daughter's 8th grade semi formal dance. We absolutely loved it! The measurements listed matched the dress & fit her perfectly. It did take two streaming treatments to get all the fold wrinkles out. So order in enough time to get the dress prepared for the big day! She is 5'6, slim & usually wears junior medium. The embroidered words are glaring and cheap! We ordered this dress for my daughter’s senior prom, and while the dress arrived about 9 days before the estimated delivery, we were really disappointed with the embroidery. There are a lot of loose threads on the floral embroidery, and some of the flower names that are embroidered are in a glaringly stand-out color right on her abdomen. It’s weird to have “Chestnut” written on her belly twice. We didn’t notice the flower names in the photos are on the listing or on customer photos because most of the embroidery is very subtle. On her dress it’s almost in a white color that really stands out. It’s kind of weird. The plus sides: dress fits her perfectly true to size. The tulle is not scratchy, and the blue is lovely. She’s 5’9” and the length is perfect. Honestly, she loves the dress enough that if I could figure out how to take the words off without messing up the tulle, I would do it. But I’m worried it will ruin the front of the dress, so it has to go back. Photos show the bright writing and the loose threads.

Beautiful with a hint of ouch. Well I'm not wearing compression garment under so I'm not "snatched" 🙄 I hate that term. It's so annoying. Lol I had to do it in mockery. But I'm super excited to know that the black slip dress underneath is a separate piece. Now I can wear my compression garment AND switch it out for my tighter compression Ha-lar-a dress that gives extra boob support. I don't like the zipper is SILVER!! When it's not in the photos.Looks like they blurred the zipper out In the photo. And it pulls at my hair at the top. Not much though, my hair is up. My hair will be down at the event. Also lacy is stiff and feels scratchy a bit on the arms because of the stiffness. I'm hoping it will soften when I wash it. So by the size chart I should have got a 3XL. But have reading mixed reviews I went with 2XL annld fits everywhere perfectly. Only a tad long. I'm 5'3" & 207 pounds.
