Love the fit & color What a great buy! It’s the right amount of elegance for a fancy event with the shoulder bow . Practically a bargain for the price you pay. I purchased the size small in brown . I couldn’t be happier with my purchase. Although it’s sold as brown, it’s actually a mustard color but it is what I wanted and as advertised on stock photo. I’m 5’2” tall . Has a bit of a stretch to material with side zip. I generally struggle to purchase maxi dresses online due to height issues but with a 2” heels I could even dance at the Christmas party . Considering purchasing other colors.

Amazing formal dress What a great dress for the money. I purchased for a cruise formal night. The dress did not disappoint! Very comfortably and as expected. I am 5'0 and over a 150 pounds… lol. Photographed, well fit well and was very comfortable. Highly recommended!

Review from a size 14 What a great dress! I am 5'5", 180 lbs, size 14, 38DD chest. I have a lot of difficulty finding a dress that fits well on all of my body parts, and makes me feel comfortable wearing it. It arrived in a tiny shipping envelope and I thought there was no way this dress is going to fit my body but I was more than pleased with it. The lace does a good job at diminishing lumps and bumps. Its just loose enough but still form fitting. I couldn't get all my measurements to line up perfectly with their size chart so I went with the closest match to my bust size and ordered a 16. The hemline dropped just below my knees so I had no issues with the dress hiking up when I sat down. The lace arm was just enough to cover my unfit upper arm too. And the best feature is that you can wear your everyday bra with this dress! I felt very good in this dress and will probably order another color so I have 2 on hand. 5 stars!

Loved it, loved it! Wonderful fun dress for an event What a great dress! I was on the fence about it but after seeing others’ pics I went for it, and I’m so glad I did. I normally have a really boring style and I liked that this was a little more fun, more flirty, and more interesting. The navy is a nice color. It arrived a bit wrinkled as expected but did fine after a quick tumble in the dryer. I’m 5’4” and this was a fine length with low heels. I normally wear a size 18 and got an XXL - perfect fit. I think other reviews mentioned that the lining along the neckline tended to bunch and come up. If I could take off half a star for that, I would, because I found myself fixing it a lot throughout the night, but it wasn’t a deal breaker and you could probably fix it with some fabric tape.

OMG AMAZING What a great gown.. worth every penny! I have to wear a gown every year for a company event, i wear one time and too much money for 1 x.. I'm 5'5'' 153# ordered a 12.. it fits perfect. I usually wear 8-10.. THANK U THANK U, will be shopping here for my gowns going forward!!!!! (excuse mess around me, wash/cleaning day) :)

Sheer & complimentary, it drapes beautifully. The sleeves are the perfect length, with sequin accents at the cuffs, just short enough to wear some fabulous jewelry without getting snagged. At 5'3", I found this to be a good length for me.

Elegant Summer Dress What a pleasant surprise! This dress was ordered as a back-up and quickly became my first choice. It’s very comfortable to wear. The bodice is lace over satin and is very forgiving. With lace can sleeves that cover your shoulder and yet not constricting at all.The high-low skirting is light and airy and moved around me like a mist of fog. There is a matching under skirting and a cute satin belt. It goes on easily and zips up the back. I wore a light slip, as it was 90 degrees and needed to make sure it draped nicely.I received so many compliments on this dress. The sizing is true - it runs small. I am 5’2” and a size 8 in this photo. I ordered a large in blue.

One is my favorite dresses! What a pleasant surprise!! I bought this strictly off of the reviews....it did not disappoint. The dress was well made, comfortable and flattering, which is hard to find in ONE dress. The price point was definitely a bonus. The fit was awesome; I'm 5'5" and 145lbs and bought the large, which was perfect!

Fits beautifully What a really nice dress. I love the fabric and the stretchiness of the fabric. I bought a large and I am my 5 foot nine 170 pound female. If you were looking for an elegant yet simple dress this one would be the perfect one.

Can I Give This More Than 5 Stars ****** Order ! What a seriously Gorg Midi Dress ! There is nothing to not love. I ordered the black in Large ( *For Reference 36C / 5'3" ) and it exceeded my expectations. The dress just makes your figure look better. The fabric is so soft and clingy, very elegant looking, but sexy at the same time. The dress is very good quality and does not wrinkle easily, which would be ideal for traveling. From the flattering rounded low neckline, to the long sheer balloon chiffon sleeves, a v-back for an alluring exit and a Asymmetrical knee length Hem with a generous frontal slit, this dress not only lays smoothly but also fits true to size . It is ideal for a formal gathering, cocktail party or dinner date. I paired it with a pair of suede pumps and opted to not use the sash that comes with around my waist. Overall I love the material, the color and the fit of this dress so much I will be ordering more colors.... :) Obsessed

Love it What a stunning maxi dress! I have no complaints, everything about it is a winner. I followed the size chart and the dress fit perfectly. It was form fitting at the top but not too tight that it was uncomfortable. The skirt is so pretty! I love the floral design, and the ruffles are such a beautiful touch! They are very lightweight and flowy. And the stitching of the top to the skirt is also top-notch because it was very smooth and didn’t cut into my skin or anything. The dress fell just above my ankles (I’m 5’6”) so I could easily wear heels or flats. And the material was pretty soft and comfortable for long-time wear. It was lightweight and breathable, so I didn’t have to worry about sweating or discomfort throughout the day. This is quite a quality dress to me, and the style looks very high-end. I could easily see this dress being sold for way more money in a department store or magazine. It looks fabulous and you will look fabulous in it!

Stunning, flattering and beautiful dress What a stunning, beautiful dress! I am 65 and blonde, the dusty rose color is so flattering and the mercury beading matches perfectly. I got SO many compliments. The dress is slimming because the chiffon does not hug the body, and even though it was maybe 4 inches too long (I am 5' 3" and wore 4" heels) it actually looked more elegant than showing the shoe. I love this dress - you can't go wrong. I had an Adrianna Papell dress also, 3 times the price of this - but this was everyone's favorite. I probably could have gotten into the size 6, but I liked the drape of a slightly more comfort fit. The photo here doesn't do it justice...and I don't agree with the review that says the mercury beading doesn't go with the dusty rose, it enhances it beautifully. The photo advertised here on the model shows the dusty rose chiffon as lighter and less sultry than it is under natural lighting.

Great Find! What a surprise! This dress is lovely! I wore it to my husband's company holiday party in received many compliments. The only thing I think it is missing is something else around the waist. I decided not to add anything however. It is full length and is sort of an a-line design. It kind of flares a little bit and is not too tight. it is also very flowy while walking and is fun to wear. I like that it is long sleeves as we live in the Michigan winters and it kept me warm the walk in to the building. It is a gorgeous dress and I would recommend. I am about 5 ft 5 size 32B bra and ordered a small. Highly recommend.

Wow! Amazing dress! What an amazing dress! I've put on a significant amount of weight and was worried about dressing up for a recent event. For reference I'm 5'2 and weigh 220 lbs. The stretch and wrap around feature along with the gorgeous, rich green color made me feel very confident. I received many compliments that night. The price point was the cherry on top! 10/10 recommend!

Wonderfully flattering dress that can be worn for multiple events! What can I say? This dress is amazing! I was looking for a dress to wear to my work Christmas party and stumbled upon this one. I read the reviews, looked at the photographs of others wearing the dress and was sold. I got so many compliments last night and I love the retro vibe of the dress. I'm seriously going to look at other styles from Miusol. The fabric is stretchy and feels like like quality material. I'm 5'4" and on the curvy side (size 16). I almost purchased 2 - 1 in XL and 1 in XXL, but decided to go for the larger one based on the reviews. I'm glad I did because it fit perfectly. It was not too tight and still has a bit of room. I purchased a crinoline skirt/slip to wear underneath for the party. This dress can be dressed up or down depending on the event or occasion. My only complaint is that the neck line is cut a little too deep for my personal taste. I ended up safety pinning the neckline to be a bit more modest since I attended a work event. As others have mentioned, it does arrive wrinkled from the packaging. I put in in my dryer on steam/wrinkle remover and didn't even have to take an iron to the dress before wearing. Also - thank you for saving me a trip to the store and the aggravation of trying on multiple dresses after working all day!

Beautiful knee length dress What can I say? This dress was my favorite part of our engagement photos!!! It was comfortable and flattering. Loved the color. May need it in other colors. I’m 5’6 and 145 lbs and got a medium.

Great shirt for wearing with biker shorts or leggings! What I liked about this shirt is the quality, nice fabric, not too heavy material and so comfortable. I also like that it covers my “bits.” I don’t like my bottom or lady parts outlined in the shorts to be noticeable. The shirt completely covered it up and for me that is my preference. I love the hemline it is curved and it is more flattering. I only wish I’d bought more colors for our trip to Disney because I had to wash it at our resort so I could wear it another day. After I realized biker shorts or leggings are the most comfortable thing to wear in the parks with all the walking. (11 plus miles a day) I’m 5’4 and 170 pounds and as you can see in the picture, it fit perfectly for my shape.

Well made, comfortable, inexpensive What more could you ask for? It can be dressed up for an evening function or down to wear into the office. I'm not a fan of polyester (a lot of it looks cheap) this is a nice relatively heavy polyester that is smooth against your skin but kind of rough on the outside. I'm 5'5', 125 lbs, Depending on the cut of the bodice, I wear either an 8 or a 10 in a dress. I used the size chart and ordered a L. Given the overall loose fit, I think the dress is closer to a size 10 than a size 8. The shoulder seams hang a little off the shoulder and the bust is a bit large. I have no hips so the dress hangs straight down. It's much longer than shown in the ad (see photo) I'll either wear it belted with boots or I'll cut it off (but then I would have to lose the flared hem) and hem it to just below the knee. It's a nice dress, but I think a medium would have fit me better.Update: I decided to go with belt and boots instead of hemming and losing the tulip hem. I like it!

Looks good, well-made, comfortable, inexpensive What more could you ask for? This would be a perfect dress for the office (does anyone still go to the office?) and easily dressed up for an after-work function. I'm not a fan of polyester (a lot of it looks cheap but this doesn't), but the red is such a beautiful deep dark rich red, and the fit is perfect, so I'll make an exception. I'm 5'5', 125 lbs, depending on the cut of the bodice, I wear either an 8 or a 10 in a dress. I used the size chart and ordered a L. I think the dress is closer to a size 8 than a 10. The fit across the shoulders and bust is perfect. I have no hips so the dress hangs in soft folds. the only negative thing that I have to say is that small v neckline would benefit from a slightly heavier interfacing to keep it flat against the chest, but that's not a deal breaker for me.

I want it in every color! When I bought this dress, I was skeptical. I was looking for something to wear to a Summer wedding. I am 5’0” and close to 200lbs. Length is usually an issue for me and I also have 38DD’s. This dress exceeded my expectations! The fit is perfect. The length hit me just right to where it covered what needed to be covered, but it didn’t make me look stumpy. It fits in all the right places. The puff sleeve detail really is cute and comfortable. The tie around the waist feels secure. The print is so adorable and the color is dreamy. This is my favorite dress! I want it in every color. I wore it to the wedding and everyone kept asking where I got it from. It does come a bit wrinkled, but a quick steam fresh out of the package and it was ready to go. Overall, I give it a 15/10!

Love this dress!! When I first got the dress I was disappointed due to the material.. it is a felt. But when I put it on it fit perfectly (3x) it wasn't heavy and it was soooo pretty!. I did have to have it hemmed it was too long I'm 5'5. I'm very satisfied with it and I wish I could wear it somewhere else again it's just too cute to have hanging in the closet.

I did have to have it hemmed it was too long I'm 5'5. I'm very satisfied with it and I wish I could wear it somewhere else again it's just too cute to have hanging in the closet.

Beautiful Classic - but cut off grain When I first got this dress I loved how it slipped on and how it felt. However I noticed that the front of the hem was shorter than the back. It would not have been much of a big deal but the transition didn't look purposeful for a hi-low hem. I took it off and tried it on later after letting it hang for a while. When I tried it on again I noticed that the neckline seemed a little off. (Probably not noticeable to anyone but me.) Still no difference in the hem. I took it off and tried a little later. After wearing it while trying it on with different shoes I noticed the dress kept shifting to one side. The dress had been cut off grain making the garment shift to one side. Very disappointed - I've been looking for a dress like this. The seam in the back was also off. I have a long torso and the waist of this dress was too long for me! I got a medium and it ran a little big but I think a small would've been too tight for my taste. The length hit me above the ankles. This is my third dress purchase from Amazon and my third fail. So sad. I'm returning and ordering another just in case - but the price went up $3.00!!! Ugh. I just hope it gets here in time for my Christmas parties. Size M-L; 8-10 Height 5'8" Weight 137 Bust 37 Waist 29 Hips 39.5 UPDATE: No more ordering clothes from Amazon for me!!! I ordered a second dress. Though the neckline and hem were better the dress was still cut off grain. The front right seam was more noticeable than the first. I’m done.

Cheaply made and not flattering! When I first got this dress, my husband thought it was pajamas in the package, based on the floral pattern. I thought it looked pretty in the pictures, and was hopeful it would look good when I tried it on. I was very disappointed. I’m around 5’4” tall, and the dress came down a lot lower than it did on the model. Almost to my ankles. It looked frumpy and, as my husband said, I looked like a peasant. The picture shows that it was cheaply made, as the tiers aren’t even entirely the same fabric: they used a white fabric in the parts that were hidden under the tier above it. However, those white areas tended to show when I sat down. The seams were also very tiny, around 1/8”, which seemed dangerously close to the edges. Perhaps this is better suited for someone who is taller, like the model in the listing.

It's a head turner! When I first pulled the dress out of the bag I thought, "No way this will fit me." Ummm, incorrect. It snatches you in, it's comfy and doesn't feel too tight, and supports you in all the right places. Loved the blue! I'm 5'6", 185 lbs, and typically wear a size 10 for reference. I purchased a L with plenty of room left to stretch.

Stylish but Slightly Flared at The Hips When I first received the jumpsuit, it felt heavy in the bag. I initially thought the fabric would be thick, but it turns out the weight is probably due to the amount of fabric needed for the full length from top to bottom. The fabric has a ribbed texture, is thin, and very stretchy. If it weren't for the dark color, it would actually be see-through. I held the fabric up to the light and noticed just how thin it really is. There's a zipper in the back that runs from the top down to about the high waist, making it very easy to get into the jumpsuit and zip it back up on my own. The jumpsuit features wide-leg bottoms and two side pockets. The top is snug and fitted to my body, while the bottom is loose with room to spare. The overall look is fine, but the sides of the pants, where the pockets are, flare out and make my hips look wider than usual. The length is perfect for me; it almost touches the ground at the back, which allows me to wear flats or low heels. For reference, I am 5’7” and 128 lbs. I ordered a size M, worrying it might be too small, so I’m not sure if the wide-hip look is because the jumpsuit might be slightly too big for me. Overall, I like the jumpsuit. I just hope the pocket area will relax after washing so my hips don’t look flared out.

A post-wearing review When I first received this dress I had my doubts about the material. I tried it on and thought it looked pretty good so I did not return it right away. I had a wedding to attend and needed to choose between this dress and a slim-fitting RL dress which required special underthings (Spanx). I chose to wear this dress because it has some spandex and no Spanx required. It was a fun dress!! Fit great and felt great! No wrinkles! I saw some reviewers worried about sweating in it. I did not, though my event was in March. Probably wouldn’t wear it in the summer. Lots of restrictions on care - basically hand wash and air dry. I am 5’1” and about 138 lbs. Size 10P fit great.

Lovely dress When I first received this dress, my first reaction was not good! It didn’t fit right! A lot of dresses I get online don’t fit like I’d expected mostly because I’m 5’2” and weigh about 155-160, and my waist is not like it used to be! But I liked the style and the colors/pattern and the fabric! So I tried adding a belt…better! It gave me definition for my waist. It made my legs look fat! That’s because it was too full and the opening to high;so I pinned it underneath so that only my knees down would show…much better! The top part was a little big and I still looked chunky. I added shoulder pads and it balanced me out; made me look slimmer! I’m really happy with it now! Dress was less than $50 and I didn’t have to have it tailored. Love it!

Really loved this dress! When I first tried this dress on I was worried it was kind of an awkward length but ended up loving it and getting so many compliments. I’m 5’3” and usually a size 18 or 20 in dresses. I bought a 3X (size 18) and it fit perfectly.

Amazing but dissatisfied When I got the dress I was so happy and jumping with joy because it’s for my quince contemporary dance. I tried it on and it fit perfectly but when I look down there’s two holes in the dress and now I have to go through the hassel of returning it. So that’s why it dosnt get 5 stars. I got size 6 and fYI as a petite I’m 5’1 so it’s long but not touching floor long it’s ankle maybe few more inches higher length.

Very flattering and beautiful dress! When I looked in the mirror, I felt really good! This dress is comfortable yet flattering and will suit many body types. It was super forgiving of my mom bod, and the waist has fabric that you can adjust depending on where your natural waist sits, so it really can be fine tuned. The fabric does wrinkle though, so if you travel with it, you'll have to steam it. Other than that, it's amazing. I'm 5'5", and your typical size 14/16 49yo mom.

Shimmers and changes color! When I opened the package , I was shocked at the color. It shimmers and changes color just like I hoped it would. I received so many compliments on this dress. And the best part, it was comfortable. No rubbing or itching from the sequence in the arms. It wasn’t as heavy as I anticipated, which was a plus. It hit in the right spot being 5 ft 1. Find a dress that fits right is like finding a needle in a haystack. The only con I can come up with is it doesn’t have pockets.

Love it - except it's defective When I opened this dress I was incredibly pleased - it's a perfect ankle length (I'm 5'2" and ordered a medium), good heft, and doesn't show too much of my bust. But unfortunately there's a line across the one side of the chest that makes it look like my bra line is permanently showing (when that isn't the shape or placement of the bra I was wearing). My guess is that some machine was too hot and damaged the fabric. Whatever the cause, I'm really disappointed; you would expect better from such an expensive dress.

Hides the mommy pooch! When I put this on it was somewhat tight as I pulled it up over my hips, but once it was zipped up it looked great! My husband loved it! The only big reactions he gives are when it’s sports related, but he smiled and said “wow!” This is a win! The neckline is modest and it gives the appearance of a plunging neckline because the type of appliqué. Also, I’ve got a mommy pooch and it totally hides it! This is a perfect going out to eat jumper! I got a small and it’s true to size. Im 5’5” 120 lbs.

Larger bust sizes, please see Size Chart! When the dress arrived, I immediately tried it on and actually liked it. I ordered the 2X which was supposed to be for 20-22 and I am an 18/20W, so I thought it could work. The fit was a bit tight at the top (bra size 46 D) and I knew I would not be able to wear one of my normal bras (most are padded), but I was fine with that (material has no stretch). I also figured that I should probably wear some shapewear to really make it work. I washed the dress before wearing it and there did not appear to be any shrinkage or loss of color. The gold dots were just as vibrant and the materials did not snag or otherwise appear altered. I wore an unpadded bra, but still felt as if the top was a bit too tight for my taste. It messed up the flow of the dress. Even the split seemed awkward to me. I didn't even worry about the bottom shapewear because the top was not working for me. This could be a pretty dress for other sizes and body-types, but it just was not for me. I should have adhered to the size chart!! Larger bust sizes please pay attention to the size chart. The max is 46" and that is a definite max with no wiggle room.

Decent for the price When the dress first came it had a very odd smell. I was able to get it cleaned and the smell was gone. I followed reviews and ordered a size down due to the top fitting larger and it fit well. I’m 5’4 135 lbs and I ordered the size 2. The fabric that goes behind the corset back didn’t fully reach so I just tucked it in and wore the back open with just the tie. Also I had to stitch the slit together because it actually went up as high as my belly button. I got lots of compliments and in the end I did like the dress. Also, I think it is good to know that there is also a zipper on the back which was hard for me to zip since I sized down. It did zip but it was pretty tight for me. I wore it with heels and the length was good.

The quality is top notch! Where do I begin to describe this sophisticated dress……, the style is so classy, the quality is top notch , the fit is perfect, and the price is unbelievable! I’m in my friend’s wedding and was asked to wear light blue for her bridal shower. I searched in high end stores, boutiques and other online shopping platforms but couldn’t find a light blue dress that’s fits my aesthetic……until I scrolled to this timeless classy dress. I’m so pleased that I purchased it! ADDED NOTE: I found the feedback from other customers about sizing to be very . I’m 5’6” and weigh 175 lbs and I ordered a size large. I wear medium but the large fits comfortably and lays SO lovely in all the right places. I rate this dress a 100.

WINNING DRESS!! Where do I start? I was stopped on the street in Washington DC, by 4 different people to compliment this dress. One compliment, "You look like royalty ". I typically wear a size 8/10 and size M fit perfectly. The length is long, and it needed hemming, so give yourself time to have hemmed if buying for an event. I'm 5'6" and wore 3 inch heels, it still needed hemming. The shoulders never crept up, the color (royal blue) wad rich. There is a zipper on the side slit so you can adjust how much leg you want to reveal. You will NOT regret buying this stunning dress.

PERFECT fit & style!!! Where this as mother of the groom dress for the wedding. The navy colour is beautiful and the material is sat chiffon which is very lovely and looks very formal. It’s a perfect fit I’m 5‘6“ and 180.lbs ordered US14. Couldn’t have fit any better! Thank you. Highly recommend.

PERFECT fit & style!!! Where this as mother of the groom dress for the wedding. The navy colour is beautiful and the material is sat chiffon which is very lovely and looks very formal. It’s a perfect fit I’m 5‘6“ and 180.lbs ordered US14. Couldn’t have fit any better! Thank you. Highly recommend.

I WANTED to love it… Where to start. If you look at the photos, you will see that the top is 100% see-through. I didn’t see that in the promo photos. So just Be aware you will need to wear a black camisole or bra or something like that underneath unless you wanna show your boobies. I guess you could put a bright color underneath there to schnaz it up a little bit. Anyway… I am 5’10” and I weigh 210 pounds. So I’m a big person and I have extremely long legs. I have a 32 inseam for reference. So, it wasn’t a surprise that these were too short however, the distance between the crotch and the shoulders was also too short. Again, I’m very tall, so this is something that I actually see a lot with clothing. I ordered an XXL and it was too small. It’s made of the fabric that is basically a tell all x-ray machine anyway. That coupled with the fact that it was about two sizes too small, made for a very bad fit. I guess to say it was a bad is kind of an understatement. I think maybe a very young body, maybe a fit body, the lines would look better. I can recommend this for shorter people who don’t mind the material clings and shows everything on your body. I did want to love it and maybe I could’ve with a combination of it being a little bigger, and or my body being a little bit more fit in toned, but it was also too short kind of everywhere. All in all I don’t think it’s a bad buy but probably about $20-$30 too much. It’s kind of cheap. Hope this helps!

Love the color! While I find this dress absolutely adorable I wish it was longer. I’m 5’8” and this dress is about 6” shorter than I would like. Other than that it’s a beautiful color and very flattering and comfortable. It appears to be well made as well!

Glitter Mesh and Poly Semi-Formal Dress. While I surprisingly like the fit and color of this dress, the fabric is nothing special. Seems overpriced for what it is. It’s a tight mesh over basic polyester lining with bits of square silver glitter throughout. Well made, yes, but still a little cheapo. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34C, 27”Waist, 35”Hips, got a Small. I love the sleeves and off-shoulder look, but there’s not much shape to the body. The skirt flows out nicely though. The Wine is more red than burgundy, which I love. It’s a bummer this dress comes off more party time than chic and sophisticated. But, it will do for a number of semi-formal events.

Classy While it was wrinkled coming out of the bag, it is a fantastic material. The fabric is not too thin or see through and it looks great once ironed. There is a side zipper that makes it easy to put it on and take off. The back is an elasticized material that accommodates for a larger bust. Overall a nice dress for going out or as a wedding guest. Female in the picture is 5'1" for length reference.

So gorgeous. Fits a bit loose though While this dress is just strikingly beautiful (do I even need to point that out?), it has its weirdness. For example, the thin foam pads in the bust (non-removable unless one cuts a hole) are kinda awkward and large, upside down triangles. But, they seem to work, just watch they don’t get crooked. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34A, 27”Waist, 34”Hips. I know I’m thin as a rail, but the Small is just loose enough to not be form-fitting like it should be. Especially loose in the waist and hips. If they has an XS, that’d probably be better. I normally don’t like tight dresses, but the fabric stretches well and I think this dress looks good a bit tight. If you’re between sizes or not sure, I’d suggest sizing down. I love the length and mermaid flare and that the lining is sewn directly onto the hem so it doesn’t get in the way. Unfortunately, the one I got has a blank strip right where the dart is so it’s super noticeable. Not all of them will be like that though, of course, but a few may have similar areas. Overall, an obviously splendid dress. I haven’t shopped for a dress this formal in a looong time, so am not up on prices, but this seems like a fair value. As long as you get your sizing right (or know a good seamstress), you’ll be golden.

If you’re between sizes or not sure, I’d suggest sizing down. I love the length and mermaid flare and that the lining is sewn directly onto the hem so it doesn’t get in the way. Unfortunately, the one I got has a blank strip right where the dart is so it’s super noticeable. Not all of them will be like that though, of course, but a few may have similar areas. Overall, an obviously splendid dress. I haven’t shopped for a dress this formal in a looong time, so am not up on prices, but this seems like a fair value. As long as you get your sizing right (or know a good seamstress), you’ll be golden.

Petite gals must buy this!!! Wow! The most flattering dress I've ever worn. I purchased this for my son's Airforce JROTC military ball that I was a chaperone for, so I needed a more formal gown. I don't usually like a fitted style, but this was just right. EVERYONE!!! was complementing me all night. I felt so comfortable in it, very confident. I am 5 ft and lost a few pounds, so about 110 now, 36C and size small was perfect. I did have to hem it as the length was a few inches long. That is all too common with my height, so I expected that. However, if you can use an iron, you can easily fix that with HeatnBond UltraHold Iron-On Adhesive also purchased here on Amazon. Since there are no layers to this dress, and the fabric is so easy to work with, it is easy to iron on the HeatnBond. It is ideal for this dress. Easily done and you don't need a sewing machine. I just might make it knee length for another event later and this dress would easily accommodate that with the slit.The vertical swag of fabric really adds a nice feminine flare. And the gathering fabric at the stomach is such a nice camouflage to hide the mama belly. The fabric is not too thin, just right to hide the panty line, there is no slip layer. I do advise that you iron or steam it so this fantastic dress looks it's best. I also purchased this dress in red, my son's school color. The fabric and fit was exactly the same, but we both decided we prefer the color blue for this event. My nude heals went so well with the color. Excellent quality for the price. I also ordered my clutch from Amazon, it is the Milisente Flower Evening Bag. Love that too!

soft and stunning Wow! This dress exceeded my expectations. Yes, it's not real lace, yes it's sort of like a For Love and Lemons FP dupe, but it's breathtaking! I love the simple little bolero, though bear in mind, it won't stand up to a cycled wash. The nude slip beneath the dress was comfortable and flattering, the V shaped back is exquisite and the little lace patterns, delicate. The best part? The dress is stretchy and curve hugging without being unflattering. I'm a pretty round medium and the dress that arrived was small. Nonetheless I was able to zip my self in comfortably and walk around easily. The gown is long but even as a petite woman of 4' 11" a pair of heels would allow me to walk around in this dress without the need to hem it. My only complaint concerns the straps, which are a bit...cheap looking and fragile seeming. Otherwise this FP dupe is perfect for most formal occasions and in a pinch, a courthouse wedding. The price is excellent for the design and quality. I just ordered myself one in black (sized Medium) and it fits as well, though slightly longer. LOVE LOVE LOVE!

Beautiful dress, great fit Wow! This dress is so flattering! Beautifully crafted and very feminine. The color is a darker, deep red, but still red. I think the online pic displays it well. The fit is great, I am usually an XS/S, got an S and it's spot on. The fabric is not the greatest, given there's nothing natural in its texture, but it does feel somewhat like cotton+spandex and the material is thick. I would recommend that for those with smaller bra sizes, as I wore a 34C with it and it felt just slightly big in that area. Totally recommend it, especially in this beautiful red shade.

I like that it had a plastic like tape under the chest part to make it stay on your chest and not gap out. I would definitely order more clothes from this designer.

Stunner Wow. This dress has been one of the best Amazon finds! I attended a gala and recvd so many compliments on the dress. The quality is amazing. It fit to size. I got the size 14. I could have went with the 12 as I am in between for the sizes. But it fit great none the less. The glittery fabric is an overlay to a poly fabric under and the glitter is thread that is made into the dress! So no loose glitter coming off. The waist is high enough that it would accommodate a pregnant belly too! The length was perfect for me and I’m 5’6.5” with a booty. It covered my feel and I wore converse bc I don’t do heels. Had I worn heels- I could have easily worn 4” ones and the dress still be great. Don’t pass this one up!!

Hello, Goddess... Wow. This dress is just as beautiful as the description photos depict. It definitely has a "Goddess" vibe! The fabric is a slinky, matte polyester that drapes beautifully. It is a little difficult to keep the shoulder ties up, but to be fair, I have narrow shoulders. As for the sizing, I would go by waist/ ribcage, it seems pretty true to the sizing chart. For reference, I am 5 foot 7, weigh 165 pounds, have a 36C bust with narrow shoulders and a short torso, carry most of my weight in the middle, and wear a US women's size 10. I ordered this dress in a size medium, and like the fit/ flow of it (see my pics). This dress shows a lot of skin, but to me, still looks classy. I think it would be gorgeous for an anniversary dinner, a night out, vacation... really anywhere (as long as the weather is warm, lol). Overall, this is a lovely dress that makes me feel pretty, and I would not hesitate to order it again.

Absolutely Gorgeous Wow. Where do I start? My original dress was an alterations nightmare after some COVID weight gain...it was costly and still ill fitting. With only days left until my wedding, I dumped my expensive Stella York dress and ordered this dress based on the great reviews and prayed for a miracle. I ordered the XL and it was perfect. It’s a winner!

Cute and super warm jacket Written by my wife: I had trouble choosing a color for this jacket, because I like them all, but I ended up ordering the reddish brown, and I really like it. It’s a perfect fall color and will coordinate with so many outfits. I love that it’s a knit sweater that looks like a jacket because it’s soft and comfortable. It’s very thick and warm and will be great for cooler weather. The pockets are deep, nice for holding a phone. I normally wear size small, but I followed the size guide and ordered medium. It’s a bit long in the arms but overall fits well and is good for layering. For reference, I am 5 ft tall, 125 lbs, 32D. I washed the jacket on gentle cycle and hung it to dry as the tag says not to tumble dry. It looks great and I had no issues.

[Stock Photo] Between reading reviews, and viewing customer-submitted photos, I went with an XL [Height: 5'5 | 200lbs | 47" Hips | 37" Waist | 44" Bust]. Which, based on their size chart...I was nervous. But it was a great and flattering fit, especially for someone who holds their weight in their lower stomach area.Overall, this bathing suite was perfect for a beach vacation. And allowing you to use the restroom without stripping down. The colors [at least on my computer] matched perfectly the suit that I received. The bottoms, really do slim up the tummy some. And the top...the lower half of the suite, was the perfect fit for me. It wasn't tight, but it also wasn't loose. You couldn't tell that I carried most of my weight in the lower tummy region. My only issue was in the chest area. I'm a 38 DD - and the cups were too big. Not to the point where I couldn't were the suit - I just had to tighten the top up more, which then was a little tight on my neck. But it worked out.

So this suit felt very nice, the material was soft. I liked the how the cups were shaped and sewn in. I dont have large boobs as it is and I'll be done nursing soon so I expect them to shrink - with that said, the top didn't support the girls very much. I bought a Large so I may size down to try it. I'm 5'7" with a long torso and weigh about 150lbs. The top was very long but you can adjust it on the sides, which then left a lot of string hanging. I usually have the most trouble with bathing suit bottoms, these were actually almost perfect. They gave me the coverage I like - not too cheeky. They stayed in place when I moved around and bent over which is a huge plus cause ain't nobody got time for constantly picking wedgies while chasing a toddler on a beach! 😆 the one thing I didn't like about the bottoms is the skinny elastic around the waist. It squeezes my abdominal fluff too much and makes it more noticeable- I find this to be the case with a lot of Amazon suits. I like the larger waistbands. Overall I do like this suit a lot, will probably try a size M although I think the L bottoms will fit me better.

This is super cute and has so many colors in the pattern, so it matches a lot! I have paired it with a bathing suit tankini top with a twist front (no bottom) from the same brand in "1-brown". (Also pictured, shown over a black dress for color purposes only showing the flexibility in colors.) It is sheer, perfect if you want a little coverage over the bottoms while on your way to the pool, drying off, etc. With that said, it really doesn't provide a ton of coverage on the open side and is a shorter style, so it might not be the right choice for you if looking for more coverage like a full cover up or longer/wider version. That is not a bad thing about the product at all, just a matter of coverage and style preference that i wanted to note. For context of the one size, I am 5'3" with waist 30.5" and hips 37.75". Overall, if okay with this style of sarong style of coverup, I totally recommend! I am looking forward to using it with many of my suits when I get out of the water while on the boat. The quality seems to be fine as well. I will update if any issues come up on this. Otherwise, you can assume quality is sufficient!

This is quality fabric and a nice visual presentation out of the package. But on the body, the fit is not quite right. For me. I wanted so much for this to work better for me. I really wanted this for the top, but oddly the bottom fits perfect and looks real nice. The top is where the issues are. In my opinion, it fits like a man designed this and never had a woman try it on. 1. The clasp in the back is difficult to get clasped. Woman's Tip: Clasp it first and slide it over your head like a shirt. Lift your breasts up into it. Rearrange the cups to work better. Nice feature: Cups slide on the chest band and aren't sewn stationary. They are adjustable to go where it works best for your body and the look you want. Also the straps come longer or shorter, like a bra. 2. The straps themselves are sewn at the wrong angle in the back. They don't come over the shoulder like a bra for support, they come in at a 'V' shape, narrowing and converging around the awkward clasp in the back. This throws the whole top off, as nice as it looks. This 'V' angle in back does a few bad things. *It makes the too narrow and non elastic torso strap ride up across your whole back in an arch that doesn't look right and is completely not supportive in the front. *It makes the cups pull weird so they bag with a gap at the side near your armpit (when they just fit perfectly and looked good before you clasped the back.) *Annnnnnd......worst of all.....it makes your boobs fall out the bottom. ☹️ Maybe just maybe the top is too big for me? Maybe a medium top would fit better? But you can't order them that way, in different sizes. I am 34B/143 lbs/5'4" I got a Large and the underpants style bottoms fit perfect tho. Sexy on the sides without letting my cheeks hang out too much the back, just enough to look nice. The bottoms don't cut in sharp in the front on the sides and show off the crotch in a way I don't want to have done (i.e.: no mandatory Bikini wax before you hit the beach or pool. That is a relief! Hard to find good coverage bikini bottoms that don't totally kill the sex appeal and I like these ones.) The fabric of the top and bottom is really nice quality fabric. I love the design and I really like how the triangles on the straps are 3D embossed feeling. I wish this fit me better overall as a nice set. Every body is different, so maybe this will work better on someone else. These are just my opinions for my body. (Sorry no photos of it on me. I'm just not bikini ready yet. It's still winter here.)

Pros: I love the design of this bikini (the pattern and the cut). The patterns are really pretty and I love that they have floral patterns that I feel like I haven’t really seen before. They also don’t look like “old lady” florals which I find some florals just immediately remind me of granny curtains. Cons: The sizing!! I ordered a medium and a large because people in the reviews said it runs small. I’m glad I did because I ended up keeping the large. The medium did fit but there was a lot of side boob and the bottoms were extremely cheeky. I would not feel comfortable wearing something this low coverage in public. The other con is that now I have to tie the back of the large because the back elastic is too loose if I use the clip. For sizing reference: I wear a 6 in American eagle jeans and a 34B or 32C bra in Victoria’s Secret. I can see why so many larger chested ladies said that no matter what size they got they couldn’t get enough coverage. Also please see the photos of the measurements and compare it to your other bathing suits. Hopefully I can help save someone reading this the return shipping and exchanging process! Despite all this, I am considering ordering a second pattern just because I love these designs so much!

I purchased this in white, in size medium. I really love it! So I purchased another in black in small. This garment is boxy style so both sizes worked for me. The material is 95% polyester and 5% Spandex. Great blend for a pool/ beach cover-up and will hold up to multiple washings. The material is light and silky with a slight fabric weave and 2 pockets. It's basically a boxy, drop shoulder mini dress. I'm 5' and it's pretty short. So if you want to flatter your middle with a stylish loose garment, but show off your legs, this is the right garment for you. It can also be worn as a long T-shirt over yoga pants or shorts.

This is a great cover-up with a balance of class and sexiness. I'm 5'4", 135 lb, and curvy, and the medium fits fine. The cover up and tie are made of a chiffon material. The first item I received had a defective tie where the stitching came undone (second picture), but the exchange was simple and the second item I received was fine. I appreciate the sleeves and long length (about knee length on me). The top part is pretty open and there's not really a good way to keep it closed if you want a more modest cover-up. I like it as is, and the open top actually looks really nice with a swimsuit that covers the chest. This cover up is great for protecting your shoulders while laying out in the sun, yet the panels can be moved to the side if you still want sun on your chest/abdomen/legs. One thing to note is that if you have it tied with both sides in the middle (like in my picture), it will probably open up a bit as you walk around. Again, not a problem for me but not ideal if you want a more modest look. One thing that would be nice is if it had a small hole in one of the sides so you could feed one of the ties through to turn it into a wrap, because there is enough fabric for that. Overall I'm very pleased with my purchase!

These are fantastic. The pads that come in most swimsuits are garbage, so I bought these to replace them all and I’m so glad I did. They give me a nice natural shape with a tiny bit of lift. I appreciate how they’re not overpadded either because I don’t want to feel like I’m wearing a push-up bra in my swimsuit. For reference, I bought the C/D size and wear a 32C bra. These were a great fit for me, but if you’re a full D cup, I’d recommend sizing up to the D/E size. They hold up well in the pool and through multiple washes, plus I’ve been using them in my sports bras too. One thing to note- if you’re looking for something that won’t let any water in, these aren’t it. The outside of these inserts are a breathable nylon with foam inside and water gets in them when you’re submerged in the pool. If you want something truly waterproof, I’d look for silicone inserts instead. But these are extremely comfortable to wear and they dry a little quicker than some other non-waterproof inserts I’ve tried. When I ordered these, they were $20 for 4 pairs which I think is a good value for the price. I’d definitely buy them again.

These are fantastic. The pads that come in most swimsuits are garbage, so I bought these to replace them all and I’m so glad I did. They give me a nice natural shape with a tiny bit of lift. I appreciate how they’re not overpadded either because I don’t want to feel like I’m wearing a push-up bra in my swimsuit. For reference, I bought the C/D size and wear a 32C bra. These were a great fit for me, but if you’re a full D cup, I’d recommend sizing up to the D/E size. They hold up well in the pool and through multiple washes, plus I’ve been using them in my sports bras too. One thing to note- if you’re looking for something that won’t let any water in, these aren’t it. The outside of these inserts are a breathable nylon with foam inside and water gets in them when you’re submerged in the pool. If you want something truly waterproof, I’d look for silicone inserts instead. But these are extremely comfortable to wear and they dry a little quicker than some other non-waterproof inserts I’ve tried. When I ordered these, they were $20 for 4 pairs which I think is a good value for the price. I’d definitely buy them again.

Cheers to these bra cups! Made of soft synthetic fabric and a foam core, this set of four pairs (8 cups) of bra cups is a dream, especially if you are larger-busted like me (32ddd). I ordered these in size D/E and you can really see that they’re sized up from many of the other foam bra cups out there. I do love the ease and comfort of bra cup inserts (especially because I have neck and back pain), but the proportions are usually off—i.e. the bra cup just sits on my bustline like a hat that’s too small. LOL. Having inserts like these that are sized to cup sized is genius. A reason I think it’s an especially nice product for bigger girls is because the foam “bump” at the bottom of the cup does provide a bit more support and an overall more shapely silhouette. I love the look with my bathing suit, and also have had success in starting these in camisoles that have shelf bras… It really is an upgrade for my look!

I want to show how this bright, colorful, and well-cut Grace Karin bathing suit looks on a real, overweight, middle-aged woman. I'm 5'5" and 175 lbs. I have always been 8 shaped until the last year or so, in which I've gained substantial weight in the midsection. I normally wear a 12-14 in women's tops, and a 14-16/L or XL in women's bottoms. The bathing suit you see in the photos is a size 18. I upsized because I do not like the elastic legs to cut into my thighs; nor do I like the back to ride up. I don't like binding straps. In other words, I like to be comfortable. Upsizing, for me, was the right move. Regarding the suit: the fabric is thick, soft, and high quality, with a substantial lining. There is not a huge amount of stretch - think expensive yoga pant, not the cheapo version. That all translates into a bit of figure-hugging. Stitching is tight and fine (I am an expert at sewing) and I don't expect this suit to fall apart after a couple of uses. This is not that kind of suit; this is more a Maxine of Hollywood quality. The design is very flattering, especially on my lumpy body. The colors are gorgeous. It's the kind of suit you take on a vacation, to make you feel good. As a Vine Voice who received this bathing suit as part of a promotion (this review), it is important that I list any negatives. In this situation, there aren't any, other than my earlier note to consider upsizing for a better fit, if you, like me, don't want the Spanx feel.

I ordered a size L, I’m 5’9 and 160 lbs, and 4 months postpartum. I’ve definitely still got the baby weight in places that I’m insecure about, and I wanted a more full coverage swimsuit than a bikini. An upcoming visit to an indoor water park prompted me to start looking for a one piece suit, and I landed on this one. It’s cute and does the trick of making me feel comfortable and confident while hiding the bits I don’t want everyone else to see. I wish it was a little more supportive of my chest, but that’s a minor issue and probably has more to do with birthing 4 kids. I also am fine with the back butt coverage, I hate with a passion swimsuits that ride up and simultaneously give you a massive wedgie while exposing your entire backside, but this one was totally fine for me. That is to say it is slightly cheeky, so be aware that this will not be your mom’s idea of a full coverage one piece swimsuit.

Love, love, love this suit! As I've gotten older I've started to appreciate a sexy one piece as much as bikinis, and I've been wanting something a little bit retro, a little bit Baywatch, without being too much of either or being super boring. Kind of a tall order for a simple one piece bathing suit - but this one fits the bill exactly. It's easy to slide on, the material feels great, it isn't burdened by cups or anything but doesn't feel like anything is missing. I love the cut in the front and it is definitely flattering for my 34C bust (natural) (but beware, if you need a lot of support for heavy tops, this probably is not for you). Usually I try to hide my broader shoulders/back and the back rolls, but this suit looks super sexy on the back and the butt. It is definitely cheeky though! Do not expect full bottom coverage by any means - my butt is small, and still showing a lot of cheek. Overall this is my favorite one piece I've ever had, and although I've snagged a few cute suits this year, this one will probably be my go-to over any other. Dixperfect design and quality is definitely there with this one!

We have looked at sarong wraps for some time and finally decided to get the Blue-Black 2 pack in size Large. The material is a light chiffon that provides enough coverage to let her feel comfortable without adding heavy layers. We live in Arizona, so adding a whole bunch more is less than desirable. The colors are nice, but not overwhelming (but we just got blue and black). The materials feel good so far. The chiffon is not opaque, so some color will come through the wraps, but it is pretty minimal. We will see how they do with some real wear and tear, but so far they look spectacular brand new. The size for the large is 74" long tip to tip and 18.5" wide through the body of the piece. The tie straps are 4" wide and are that for about 14" and then it rounds out to the 18.5". My wife is 5'4" 140 lb, and wears a medium in most clothing and the large ties well, it doesn't end up with a large gap from tying too far away from the thick part of the material. The runout after the tie is long enough to access easily but not too long to make it look poorly sized. I think she could have also gone with medium, but she wanted extra coverage just in case - which for a cover wrap is no problem.Really happy with them, she has a lot of blacks and blues in her swimsuit sets and they match well to pieces she has. Very pleased so far!

Okay, first time using the iOS feature that lets you copy a pic without its background on your phone! Pretty handy for this. I was pleasantly surprised with the fit of this suit. I am 5’5” 120 lbs and medium is perfect. My chest (below boobs) measures 31.5 and the (non-adjustable) band fits great. It has some stretch so probably another inch or so either way would work. The cups are lightly padded (removable) and full coverage. Straps are adjustable so while my girls are small (34A or B) the top fits great and I believe the adjustability could accommodate quite a bit of size difference in that dept. I have a booty and the bottoms are moderately cheeky. (I also have cellulite and have decided after trying on every kind of bottom that covering two more inches of it with grandma panties just made me look older/frumpier, when all the dimples on my legs were still showing anyway). Both top and bottoms feel really secure. Ribbed fabric gives it a higher end flair. Overall super happy with my purchase of a product I hate shopping for!

So, I literally just returned from a vacation where I asked a complete stranger at the pool, "where did you get that suit? it's adorable!" She looked up her amazon orders and I took a pic of her phone. I ordered it immediately and it arrived today. (she was lovely, by the way...we had a nice chat). Anyway...this suit is so awesome. I HATE one-piece suits. I am "tallish", but have a very long torso. I have to pull normal suits up so high that they stretch out and made me look like....I dunno....a marshmallow? Ew....it's bad whatever it is. Details below and WHY this suit works: 1. I am 5'6", 140lbs, and purchased a medium 2. I have large breasts for my overall frame and the ladies are starting to head south a bit. The MOST amazing thing about this suit is that the tie in the middle of the back adjusts the straps over your shoulders and pulls "the girls" up. Plus the plunging neckline on the front is super flattering. I wear a lot of this neckline style in tankini tops, with the tie "halter-style". I have to pull those so tight that it actually hurts my neck and leaves a mark by the end of the day. NOT this suit. This suit adjusts in the middle of your waist, it also pulls in the sides of the suit making your front AND your waistline more flattering. 3. It's cheeky. I'm not used to that, but it works. It makes the back into a flattering hour-glass to V shape which is, again, accomplished on the front of the suit with the low-cut neckline 4. Ruching. The stomach is perfectly pleated and flattering. I have had SO many suits that are overly-ruched (is that a phrase...I'm using it), which just makes your stomach look even bigger. Bad! 5. I'm including pics trying it on so ignore the tag in the back. I always appreciate reviews with pictures...even though I don't want to do them myself. But...I'm trying to be ;)

In prep for the summer and the swim lessons I plan to take. I have been on the hunt for attractive and comfortable swinware. When I spotted this two piece tankini I felt it would fit my needs. I ordered the black in a medium (US 8-10). However, the size I received was a small (US 4-6). Needless to say, the suit does not fit. I was able to shimmy into the panty bottom. This was possible even with me being 5'6, 150 lbs, because I am smaller on the bottom than on the top. I could not fit into the top. I measured the circumference of the waistband for the bottoms to be approximately 23 1/2". The widest area of the bottoms has a circumference of about 30". Due to the design of the straps, there is approximately 3 3/4" to adjust the straps to increase or decrease the length. The length of the tankini top is approximately 15 1/4" in the front and 12 1/2" in the back. The top has ruching on the sides, which helps to camaflodge the belly and sides. The fabric shell is 85% polyester and 15% elastane. The lining is 95% polyester and 5% elastane. The suite is wash and hang or lay flat to dry. I gave this two piece tankini suite 4 stars because I received the wrong size and was not able to fit into the top.

MIVEI Women's Sports Bra Swimsuit TopI ordered this sports bra for my 13 yr old daughter. I ordered the Small in Black. It is made of quick dry material and if very stretchy. The material is smooth and made of 80% nylon and 20% spandex. It is very stretchy and comfortable. It has a racerback and provides full coverage with a stretchy waistband that provides plenty of support. While I feel the XS would fit my daughter a little better I figured the small gives her some room to grow and allows for any potential shrinkage from numerous washings. She said that it is super comfortable and likes wearing it. It does have removable breast pads. It can also be used as a swim top and is chlorine resistant and has a UPF of 50+. I would recommend this product to others.

Resumen: encubrimiento de verano aireado y versátil en un estilo de camisa que se puede usar dentro o fuera de la playa o piscina. Lo suficientemente grande como para sentirse suelto y relajado, pero no enorme y se ajusta a la talla. Materiales/Construcción: suelo ir por el algodón, pero este poliéster ligero se siente ventoso y suave. No hay quejas sobre la construcción. Fiel a las fotos de los productos. En los lados tienen hendiduras altas que dividen el encubrimiento en 2 paneles frontales y la parte posterior, que atrapará una brisa agradable, evita que se vea como una camisa súper larga con botones. Ajuste/tamaño: mido 5'1" de altura y pedí el tamaño pequeño de acuerdo con la tabla de tallas, y me quedo perfecto y cómo quería. Estoy contento con el ajuste, puedo abotonarlo, dejarlo abierto o incluso atarme en la cintura. Las hendiduras altas y el frente abierto permiten que se muestre más de mi cuerpo para que no me pierda en una camisa “sin forma”. Me encanta que las mangas puedan ser con pestañas hacia arriba o largas; ya que ayudan con el sol.

When I first saw and liked this bathing suit, I was hesitant due to the typical age-appropriate stereotypes associated with swimwear. At 68, I was tired of the limited options marketed for "older women", and no, I didn't want to wear one of those, often recommended, bathing suits with a skirt down to my knees. This bathing suit proved to be a game-changer. It defies stereotypes, allowing us seniors to embrace body-positive fashion for women of all ages.This bathing suit caught my eye, even though it was showcased on a young, well-toned model. Despite not resembling the young model, this suit made me feel comfortable and empowered. For reference, I'm 5'4, 115-120lbs, and the size small fits me perfectly, so be sure to order your regular size. The fear of wedged bottoms or camel-toe is non-existent with this suit. The ruched pattern on the torso conceals any stomach imperfections, and the suit offers excellent support. The quality is outstanding, with strong stitching and well-designed structure. Made with mesh lining, nylon and spandex, it elegantly molds to curves and provides excellent coverage. The push-up bra with removable paddding adds versatility, allowing for customization.The long zipper at the back, aided by a convenient attached string makes it easy to put on solo. I love its versatility. It easily transitions from beachwear to an elegant top, pairing seamlessly with jeans, pants, or a skirt. This bathing suit is a celebration of beauty at any age, size, or shape. Very reasonably priced, it's a must-have for those seeking comfort, style, and positive, age-defying statement. Highly recommended 👌

I got this to wear beneath my rashguard as I'm very busty and I NEED support. Fabric: This fabric is very soft to the touch and feels great on the skin. It isn't itchy or irritating and honestly feels softer than some other suits I own. Quality: The top is fully lined, which is a must for swimwear. The lining fabric appears to be the same as the outer material. There is also a mesh lining in the front which I can only assume is for breathability. It seems to be very well-made with no flaws in stitching. No loose threads or uneven seams. Fit: My underbust measurement is 33", overbust is 41.5", and I wear a US 34H bra. I ordered the XL and the band offers quite a snug and supportive fit. While it is snug, it isn't so much so to the point of being uncomfortable. I prefer a snug fit in the band so I don't have to worry and underboob and slipping out the bottom. I do wish the straps were adjustable and that there was a little bit more coverage in front. But it's fine since I'll be wearing this beneath something and it won't be seen anyway. I'll have to see how well it wears when wet and for a prolonged period of time. But for now, I think this was a good option.

I am 5'3, 112lbs and an A cup. I ordered the XS and it fit perfectly. I sometimes struggle finding suits on Amazon as even the smaller sizes seem to always have a D cup or higher. Overall it's a great top and I would definitely recommend to my smaller ladies.

I am so happy with this purchase! We all know the dreaded swimsuit purchase on Amazon usually does NOT go well. Between trying to get the right size and then waiting weeks for the arrival from China just to find out the suit isn't what was advertised or fits like it was made for a 4'11" size 00 person just makes me want to give up on online suit shopping! This year I had my heart set on a lemon suit and after trying on a suit at TJ Maxx that was beyond hysterical (it was cut so high it showed my whole lemon 😂) and a suit at Dillard's that was approximately 9 million dollars, I had just about given up. Then I saw this suit on Amazon. I thought, "Nah, it won't fit, and by the time it gets here summer will be over," but after a week of thinking I decided to give it a try since it was only $25. I normally wear a size 12ish so I ordered the XXL (size 14) thinking it would probably be best to buy slightly bigger. I hit order and to my delight it said it would be delivered in 2 DAYS! What!?! No 3 week wait? Oh my sweet heavens to Betsy was I pumped about that! Well the suit arrived today and it fits like a dream! It covers my whole bootie and has a lovely high waist. The top looks amazing as off the shoulder or strappless and if you take your arms out of the sleeves it looks like a whole different suit! I could not be happier! I might even go buy another print I love it so much!

Jim's wife here. As you can see I'm thiccck! So finding a good suit that is pretty, fits well and covers my all "assets" is not an easy feat. I'm always apprehensive when ordering online since you can't try it on before purchasing, but I always look at the sizing chart and go based on the measurements. I've got it all, big boobs, big butt, a big belly, wide hips, and thick legs. Speaking of, please excuse the weird tan on my legs. We went fishing and I was wearing capris. 😅 So, based on the measurements, I'm somewhere between a 2XL and a 3XL. I always size up because I'd rather it be a bit big vs being too tight. I have a 45" bust and 54" hips, and 45" waist, which doesn't really matter for this type of suit. Based on this, I ordered the 3XL. The suit was scheduled to arrive on a Tuesday, which unfortunately was already a day too late to make it on time for our vacation, my fault though as I waited too long to place the order. However, what wasn't my fault was that the suit was shipped out a whole day later than the scheduled time so it ended up getting delivered on Wednesday. So that was disappointing. I recommend you order a week in advance if you want it in on time for a trip. About the suit. I haven't worn it to the pool yet but based on how it fits and feels on me now I don't foresee any issues. It feels amazing. It is so soft and comfortable. The cup inserts are nice and thick and cover the breast fully and give a nice gentle lift. Usually, I end up taking them out because they're too small but not this time around. These are fantastic! The bodice is great and my hubby pointed out that it doesn't make my sides bulge out which is awesome. The suit and booty shorts fit as expected. The shorts are double layered so you won't have issues with them being see through and they cover my butt fully. They fit and feel great. Although, I bought a second pair of swim bottoms because I wanted something with longer legs to prevent my thighs from chafing. I am noticing though the the inside part of the legs on the booty shorts are rolling up as I sit here on my couch, so I'm glad that I got the longer "biker style" swim shorts. All in all I think this is a great buy. I am not disappointed at all with the feel or quality of the suit. Plus I absolutely love that it looks like a little dress that I can comfortably walk around in and not feel self conscious about it being a bathing suit. I do wish they offered a longer short, but that's okay. If I had skinnier legs booty shorts would be just fine. Rating: I'm giving 4 stars. If the suit had arrived on time, as projected, I would give it 5 stars but since it was a day late, I deducted a star. All in all I recommend this suit/seller.

I am 5’9”, 160lbs, wear a size 10 pants (30/32) and have a 38C cup. I ordered a large of this tummy controlled one piece bathing suit and where as it mostly fits, this product has a lot of issues. As shown in the photos, many of the stitches are uneven or different lengths which causes odd lumps, rolls or places this suit sits oddly. It gaps at the breast side even with the shoulder straps tightened till then dig into the skin. The waist strap has several areas that the stitching is not straight which causes the fabric to roll on itself, making folds that do not flatter the form. The back does not sit flat because the stitching on the elastic is to tight, pulling at the fabric. Where as this bathing suit does have a mesh liner on the front bottom part, it offers no true tummy support and does not offer any compression. Instead, because it is only on the front half and not all the way around, it causes the fabric around the rump and lower back to be to thin, causing wrinkles and bunching. The pads in the breast are round and do not offer any real support or stability and for a middle aged woman both are needed with softer breast tissue. This causes the need for adjustment often. The straps placement makes it difficult to shorten or lengthen the straps without having to partially undress or risk breaking seams. The back tie is for looks only, not really assisting in holding the bathing suit to the body but needs to be tied to feel larger breasts from traveling. This bathing suit had beautiful potential yet fell far from the mark with the lack of attention to detail. This suit may work better on smaller chested, younger people but it is not something I would be comfortable wearing.

Ok. I'm not one to post bikini pics publicly, BUT...when I say I'm impressed with CUPSHE bikinis, I...AM...IMPRESSED! This is the first time I've bought a bikini that's not a mix-n-match when it comes to sizing and I bought 2 from CUPSHE based on other reviews with photos/measurements, etc, and I love both! So, I hope I'm able to pay it forward... I'm 5'5", 117lb, more junk in the trunk than treasure in the chest, so I normally have to buy a size larger in bottoms. I went with a medium and it was perfect! (In both that I purchased!) I feel body-confident in it, it doesn't ride up as I move, it appears well-made (no poor stitching), no snags in the ribbed outer material, and the color is beautiful. Another small bonus is how the tags are attached. I'm a tag remover and these were perfect ~ attached by a string, rather than the tag directly being attached to the bikini itself. Easily removed with no itchy scratchy factor from leftover tag bits. It arrived with all tags attached, hygienic liner in place, and in a zipper type plastic bag. I definitely recommend CUPSHE and will probably be purchasing more myself soon!

5’6 - 180-190lbs - size 10/12 - curvy - 38DD, 34” waste line, 41” hips - L/XL Ordered an XL This is a looking cute sitting on the beach or by the pool bikini, probably wouldn’t swim in this. This bikini has great stretch with providing moderate support overall. The top is just a little small on me but the girls stay in place! I can lift my arms up, move them around, walk, bend over, and they don’t spill out but you can see my under boob sticking out the bottom but I don’t really mind it because they stay in place. I will probably be adjusting myself every so often and checking to make sure my chest isn’t entirely exposed. The top is one piece of fabric and doesn’t have any clasps or adjustment straps. The set feels more like a bralette and panty which gives it that comfortability. The bottoms have a nice thick band and doesn't cut into anything and it goes high enough to sit over my belly. The bottoms are very cheeky but I feel covered in the right places. The bottoms also fit slightly bigger in the back so the fabric bunches a little. I might order a size L just to see if the bottom fits better but I definitely wouldn’t fit in a L top. I am going to rerun this because of the color and see how a L/XL black set works when I mix the sizes. it’s a great price point so I don’t doing that.

First of all, I hate swimsuits. Hate-hate relationship. With that being said, this bikini was actually true to size based on the size chart. I do peek out a little underneath on the top so I almost wonder if I should have sized up, but then I don’t think the bottoms would fit if I would have went XL. Recommend selling this suit in separates for those of us bigger on the top or bottom. Overall, I’m impressed. First suit from this brand!

This is a super cute two piece bathing suit. For reference, I am 5’3 and weigh 170lbs. I ordered the black medium size of this product and it fits perfectly. The top comes apart and ties in the front so it is very easy to put on my body. I don’t have to try and squeeze it over my body which makes it easier to put on and take off. The strings in the front are super long so I am able to tie a beautiful bow in the front. The skirt is super flirty and cute. It has strings that can be tightened and tied. I’m able to wear this bathing suit to restaurants since it looks like an outfit. The top and skirt dries up quickly after getting out of the water.

Will definitely be buying more colors!

I refused to settle for a granny suit, I searched high and low for something that would support my milk laden, already not so perky br**sts, butt coverage, tummy control, and still show a little back so I didn't feel like a whale with the high back most one pieces have and this suit hit all the boxes. I have a long torso so surely I thought to myself I would try it on and return it bc my br**sts were ab to be everywhere and I wouldn't feel cute but this suit is a keeper and will definitely repurchase should I lose weight or might even get a different color. Happy swim season.
